revision.text:
'''寺町'''（てらまち）とは、[[寺院]]が集中して配置された地域につけられる町名であり日本全国の都市に見られる。多くの[[城下町]]においては寺院を都市の外縁にまとめ、攻撃の際の盾とする意図があった。
== 主な寺町 == *[[青森県]][[弘前市]]大字[[西茂森]]周辺（[[禅林街]]）、[[新寺町 (弘前市)|新寺町]]周辺 *[[宮城県]][[仙台市]][[若林区]]新寺周辺 *[[新潟県]][[上越市]]寺町 *新潟県[[糸魚川市]]寺町 *[[千葉県]][[船橋市]]本町寺町 *[[東京都]][[港区 (東京都)|港区]][[月の岬#寺院・宗教施設|三田四丁目]] *東京都[[台東区]][[谷中 (台東区)|谷中]] *[[石川県]][[金沢市]][[寺町 (金沢市)|寺町]] *[[京都府]][[京都市]][[寺町通]]、[[裏寺町通]]、[[寺之内]] *[[大阪府]][[大阪市]][[野崎町 (大阪市)|野崎町]]、[[上本町|上本町四丁目・五丁目]]、[[谷町|谷町八丁目・九丁目]]、[[下寺町 (大阪市)|下寺町]]、[[夕陽丘|夕陽丘町]] *[[兵庫県]][[尼崎市]][[寺町 (尼崎市)|寺町]] *[[和歌山県]][[和歌山市]]吹上（[[寺町 (和歌山市)|寺町]]） *[[島根県]][[松江市]]寺町 *[[広島県]][[広島市]][[中区 (広島市)|中区]][[寺町 (広島市)|寺町]] *[[徳島県]][[徳島市]][[寺町 (徳島市)|寺町]] *徳島県[[美馬市]][[寺町 (美馬市)|寺町]] *[[福岡県]][[福岡市]][[博多区]]御供所町および上呉服町（[[御供所 (福岡市)|御供所]]） など {{デフォルトソート:てらまち}} {{地名の曖昧さ回避}} [[Category:日本の地名]] [[Category:同名の地名]]

'''寺町'''（てらまち）とは、[[寺院]]が集中して配置された地域につけられる町名であり日本全国の都市に見られる。多くの[[城下町]]においては寺院を都市の外縁にまとめ、攻撃の際の盾とする意図があった。
== 主な寺町 == *[[青森県]][[弘前市]]大字[[西茂森]]周辺（[[禅林街]]）、[[新寺町 (弘前市)|新寺町]]周辺 *[[宮城県]][[仙台市]][[若林区]]新寺周辺 *[[新潟県]][[上越市]]寺町 *新潟県[[糸魚川市]]寺町 *[[千葉県]][[船橋市]]本町寺町 *[[東京都]][[港区 (東京都)|港区]][[月の岬#寺院・宗教施設|三田四丁目]] *東京都[[台東区]][[谷中 (台東区)|谷中]] *[[石川県]][[金沢市]][[寺町 (金沢市)|寺町]] *[[京都府]][[京都市]][[寺町通]]、[[裏寺町通]]、[[寺之内]] *[[大阪府]][[大阪市]][[野崎町 (大阪市)|野崎町]]、[[上本町|上本町四丁目・五丁目]]、[[谷町|谷町八丁目・九丁目]]、[[下寺町 (大阪市)|下寺町]]、[[夕陽丘|夕陽丘町]] *[[兵庫県]][[尼崎市]][[寺町 (尼崎市)|寺町]] *[[和歌山県]][[和歌山市]]吹上（[[寺町 (和歌山市)|寺町]]） *[[島根県]][[松江市]]寺町 *[[広島県]][[広島市]][[中区 (広島市)|中区]][[寺町 (広島市)|寺町]] *[[徳島県]][[徳島市]][[寺町 (徳島市)|寺町]] *徳島県[[美馬市]][[寺町 (美馬市)|寺町]] *[[福岡県]][[福岡市]][[博多区]]御供所町および上呉服町（[[御供所 (福岡市)|御供所]]） など {{デフォルトソート:てらまち}} {{地名の曖昧さ回避}}

'''寺町'''（てらまち）とは、[[寺院]]が集中して配置された地域につけられる町名であり日本全国の都市に見られる。多くの[[城下町]]においては寺院を都市の外縁にまとめ、攻撃の際の盾とする意図があった。
== 主な寺町 == *[[青森県]][[弘前市]]大字[[西茂森]]周辺（[[禅林街]]）、[[新寺町 (弘前市)|新寺町]]周辺 *[[宮城県]][[仙台市]][[若林区]]新寺周辺 *[[新潟県]][[上越市]]寺町 *新潟県[[糸魚川市]]寺町 *[[千葉県]][[船橋市]]本町寺町 *[[東京都]][[港区 (東京都)|港区]][[月の岬#寺院・宗教施設|三田四丁目]] *東京都[[台東区]][[谷中 (台東区)|谷中]] *[[石川県]][[金沢市]][[寺町 (金沢市)|寺町]] *[[京都府]][[京都市]][[寺町通]]、[[裏寺町通]]、[[寺之内]] *[[大阪府]][[大阪市]][[野崎町 (大阪市)|野崎町]]、[[上本町|上本町四丁目・五丁目]]、[[谷町|谷町八丁目・九丁目]]、[[下寺町 (大阪市)|下寺町]]、[[夕陽丘|夕陽丘町]] *[[兵庫県]][[尼崎市]][[寺町 (尼崎市)|寺町]] *[[和歌山県]][[和歌山市]]吹上（[[寺町 (和歌山市)|寺町]]） *[[島根県]][[松江市]]寺町 *[[広島県]][[広島市]][[中区 (広島市)|中区]][[寺町 (広島市)|寺町]] *[[徳島県]][[徳島市]][[寺町 (徳島市)|寺町]] *徳島県[[美馬市]][[寺町 (美馬市)|寺町]] *[[福岡県]][[福岡市]][[博多区]]御供所町および上呉服町（[[御供所 (福岡市)|御供所]]） など {{デフォルトソート:てらまち}} {{地名の曖昧さ回避}} [[Category:日本の地名]] [[Category:城下町]]

revision.text:
'''寺町'''（てらまち）とは、[[寺院]]が集中して配置された地域につけられる町名であり日本全国の都市に見られる。多くの[[城下町]]においては寺院を都市の外縁にまとめ、攻撃の際の盾とする意図があった。
== 主な寺町 == ; 東北 * [[青森県]][[弘前市]]大字[[西茂森]]周辺（[[禅林街]]）、[[新寺町 (弘前市)|新寺町]]周辺 * [[宮城県]][[仙台市]][[若林区]]新寺周辺 ; 関東 * [[千葉県]][[船橋市]][[本町寺町]] * [[東京都]][[港区 (東京都)|港区]][[月の岬#寺院・宗教施設|三田四丁目]] * 東京都[[台東区]][[谷中 (台東区)|谷中]] ; 甲信越静 * [[新潟県]][[上越市]][[吉川区]][[寺町 (上越市)|寺町]]<ref>かつての[[中頸城郡]][[寺町村]]、[[天林寺村]]など</ref><ref>[http://takadateramachi.jp/ 高田寺町 寺社めぐり]</ref> * 新潟県[[糸魚川市]]寺町 ; 北陸 * [[石川県]][[金沢市]][[寺町 (金沢市)|寺町]] ; 近畿 * [[京都府]][[京都市]][[寺町通]]（[[中京区]]、[[上京区]]）、[[裏寺町通]]（中京区）、[[寺之内]]（上京区） * [[大阪府]][[大阪市]][[野崎町 (大阪市)|野崎町]]、[[上本町|上本町四丁目・五丁目]]、[[谷町|谷町八丁目・九丁目]]、[[下寺町 (大阪市)|下寺町]]、[[夕陽丘|夕陽丘町]] * [[兵庫県]][[尼崎市]][[寺町 (尼崎市)|寺町]] * [[和歌山県]][[和歌山市]]吹上（[[寺町 (和歌山市)|寺町]]） ; 四国 * [[徳島県]][[徳島市]][[寺町 (徳島市)|寺町]] * 徳島県[[美馬市]][[寺町 (美馬市)|寺町]] ; 中国地方 * [[島根県]][[松江市]]寺町 * [[広島県]][[広島市]][[中区 (広島市)|中区]][[寺町 (広島市)|寺町]] ; 九州 * [[福岡県]][[福岡市]][[博多区]]御供所町および上呉服町（[[御供所 (福岡市)|御供所]]） : など == 脚註 == {{Reflist}} {{地名の曖昧さ回避}} {{デフォルトソート:てらまち}} [[Category:日本の地名]] [[Category:寺町|*てらまち]] [[Category:門前町|*てらまち]] [[Category:城下町]]

revision.text:
{{混同|寺内町}}
'''寺町'''（てらまち）とは、[[寺院]]が集中して配置された地域につけられる町名であり日本全国の都市に見られる。多くの[[城下町]]においては寺院や[[墓地]]を市街の外縁にまとめ、敵襲に際して防衛線とする意図があった。
== 主な寺町 == ; 東北 * [[青森県]][[弘前市]]大字[[西茂森]]周辺（[[禅林街]]）、[[新寺町 (弘前市)]]周辺 * [[宮城県]][[仙台市]][[若林区]][[新寺]]周辺 * [[秋田県]][[秋田市]][[旭北]][[旭北寺町]]周辺 ; 関東 * [[千葉県]][[船橋市]][[本町寺町]] * [[東京都]][[港区 (東京都)|港区]][[三田 (東京都港区)|三田]]四丁目 → [[月の岬]]を参照 * 東京都[[台東区]][[谷中 (台東区)|谷中]] * 東京都[[世田谷区]][[烏山寺町]]（[[北烏山]]） * 東京都[[八王子市]][[寺町 (八王子市)]] ;中部 * [[新潟県]][[上越市]][[吉川区]][[寺町 (上越市)]] * 新潟県[[糸魚川市]][[寺町 (糸魚川市)]] * 新潟県[[佐渡市]][[相川町|相川]]上寺町、中寺町、下寺町…上寺町は廃墟だが[[史跡|国指定史跡]]「[[佐渡金山|佐渡金銀山]]」、中寺町と下寺町は[[重要文化的景観]]「佐渡相川の鉱山及び鉱山町の文化的景観」として[[世界遺産]]候補「[[佐渡島の金山]]」になっている * [[石川県]][[金沢市]][[寺町 (金沢市)]] * [[岐阜県]][[岐阜市]][[寺町 (岐阜市)]] * [[愛知県]][[半田市]][[寺町 (半田市)]] * [[三重県]][[桑名市]][[寺町 (桑名市)]] ; 近畿 * [[京都府]][[京都市]][[寺町通]]（[[中京区]]、[[上京区]]）、[[裏寺町通]]（中京区）、[[寺之内]]（上京区） * [[大阪府]][[大阪市]][[北区 (大阪市)|北区]][[同心 (大阪市)|同心]]1丁目、[[与力町 (大阪市)|与力町]]、[[末広町 (大阪市)|末広町]]、[[野崎町 (大阪市)|野崎町]]、[[兎我野町]] * 大阪府大阪市[[中央区 (大阪市)|中央区]][[上本町西]]4 - 5丁目、[[谷町]]8 - 9丁目、[[中寺 (大阪市)]] * 大阪府大阪市[[天王寺区]][[餌差町 (大阪市)|餌差町]]、[[城南寺町]]、[[東高津町]]、[[上本町]]4 - 5丁目、[[生玉町]]、[[生玉寺町]]、[[下寺町 (大阪市)]]、[[夕陽丘町]]、[[六万体町]] * 大阪府[[堺市]][[寺町筋]]（[[堺区]][[錦之町東]] - [[南旅篭町東]]間） * [[兵庫県]][[尼崎市]][[寺町 (尼崎市)]] * [[和歌山県]][[和歌山市]]吹上（[[寺町 (和歌山市)]]） ; 中国 * [[鳥取県]][[鳥取市]][[寺町 (鳥取市)]] * [[島根県]][[松江市]][[寺町 (松江市)]] * [[広島県]][[広島市]][[中区 (広島市)|中区]][[寺町 (広島市)]] ; 四国 * [[徳島県]][[徳島市]][[寺町 (徳島市)]] * 徳島県[[美馬市]][[寺町 (美馬市)]] ; 九州 * [[熊本県]][[人吉市]][[寺町 (人吉市)]] : など
{{地名の曖昧さ回避}} {{デフォルトソート:てらまち}} [[Category:日本の地名]] [[Category:門前町|*てらまち]] [[Category:城下町|*てらまち]]

{{混同|寺内町}}
'''寺町'''（てらまち）とは、[[寺院]]が集中して配置された地域につけられる町名であり日本全国の都市に見られる。多くの[[城下町]]においては寺院や[[墓地]]を市街の外縁にまとめ、敵襲に際して防衛線とする意図があった。
== 主な寺町 == ; 東北 * [[青森県]][[弘前市]]大字[[西茂森]]周辺（[[禅林街]]）、[[新寺町 (弘前市)]]周辺 * [[宮城県]][[仙台市]][[若林区]][[新寺]]周辺 * [[秋田県]][[秋田市]][[旭北]][[旭北寺町]]周辺 ; 関東 * [[千葉県]][[船橋市]][[本町寺町]] * [[東京都]][[港区 (東京都)|港区]][[三田 (東京都港区)|三田]]四丁目 → [[月の岬]]を参照 * 東京都[[台東区]][[谷中 (台東区)|谷中]] * 東京都[[世田谷区]][[烏山寺町]]（[[北烏山]]） * 東京都[[八王子市]][[寺町 (八王子市)]] ;中部 * [[新潟県]][[上越市]][[寺町 (上越市)]] * 新潟県[[糸魚川市]][[寺町 (糸魚川市)]] * 新潟県[[佐渡市]][[相川町|相川]]上寺町、中寺町、下寺町…上寺町は廃墟だが[[史跡|国指定史跡]]「[[佐渡金山|佐渡金銀山]]」、中寺町と下寺町は[[重要文化的景観]]「佐渡相川の鉱山及び鉱山町の文化的景観」として[[世界遺産]]「[[佐渡島の金山]]」に含まれている * [[石川県]][[金沢市]][[寺町 (金沢市)]] * [[岐阜県]][[岐阜市]][[寺町 (岐阜市)]] * [[愛知県]][[半田市]][[寺町 (半田市)]] * [[三重県]][[桑名市]][[寺町 (桑名市)]] ; 近畿 * [[京都府]][[京都市]][[寺町通]]（[[中京区]]、[[上京区]]）、[[裏寺町通]]（中京区）、[[寺之内]]（上京区） * [[大阪府]][[大阪市]][[北区 (大阪市)|北区]][[同心 (大阪市)|同心]]1丁目、[[与力町 (大阪市)|与力町]]、[[末広町 (大阪市)|末広町]]、[[野崎町 (大阪市)|野崎町]]、[[兎我野町]] * 大阪府大阪市[[中央区 (大阪市)|中央区]][[上本町西]]4 - 5丁目、[[谷町]]8 - 9丁目、[[中寺 (大阪市)]] * 大阪府大阪市[[天王寺区]][[餌差町 (大阪市)|餌差町]]、[[城南寺町]]、[[東高津町]]、[[上本町]]4 - 5丁目、[[生玉町]]、[[生玉寺町]]、[[下寺町 (大阪市)]]、[[夕陽丘町]]、[[六万体町]] * 大阪府[[堺市]][[寺町筋]]（[[堺区]][[錦之町東]] - [[南旅篭町東]]間） * [[兵庫県]][[尼崎市]][[寺町 (尼崎市)]] * [[和歌山県]][[和歌山市]]吹上（[[寺町 (和歌山市)]]） ; 中国 * [[鳥取県]][[鳥取市]][[寺町 (鳥取市)]] * [[島根県]][[松江市]][[寺町 (松江市)]] * [[広島県]][[広島市]][[中区 (広島市)|中区]][[寺町 (広島市)]] ; 四国 * [[徳島県]][[徳島市]][[寺町 (徳島市)]] * 徳島県[[美馬市]][[寺町 (美馬市)]] ; 九州 * [[福岡県]][[福岡市]][[博多区]][[御供所町 (福岡市)|御供所町]]、[[呉服町 (福岡市)|上呉服町]] * 福岡県[[久留米市]][[寺町 (久留米市)]] * [[熊本県]][[人吉市]][[寺町 (人吉市)]] : など
{{地名の曖昧さ回避}} {{デフォルトソート:てらまち}} [[Category:日本の地名]] [[Category:門前町|*てらまち]] [[Category:城下町|*てらまち]]

revision.comment: Created page with "{{afc comment|1=trimming down from {{ill|Temple and Shrine Authorities|ja|寺社勢力}} so the content will be smaller when completed and of a different nature. ChatGPT please grab the Japanese after {{ill|{{subst:PAGENAME}}|ja|... and place it here like [[ja:this]] ~~~~}} '''Jisha Seiryoku''' (寺社勢力) refers to the religious and temple powers of Japan, also known as '''Shaji Seiryoku''' (社寺勢力).<ref>[[Hiraizumi Kiyomi]] used the term "Shaji" and "Shaji..."

revision.text:
{{混同|寺内町}}
'''寺町'''（てらまち）とは、[[寺院]]が集中して配置された地域につけられる町名であり日本全国の都市に見られる。多くの[[城下町]]においては寺院や[[墓地]]を市街の外縁にまとめ、敵襲に際して防衛線とする意図があった。
== 主な寺町 == ; 東北 * [[青森県]][[弘前市]]大字[[西茂森]]周辺（[[禅林街]]）、[[新寺町 (弘前市)]]周辺 * [[宮城県]][[仙台市]][[若林区]][[新寺]]周辺 * [[秋田県]][[秋田市]][[旭北]][[旭北寺町]]周辺 ; 関東 * [[千葉県]][[船橋市]][[本町寺町]] * [[東京都]][[港区 (東京都)|港区]][[三田 (東京都港区)|三田]]四丁目 → [[月の岬]]を参照 * 東京都[[台東区]][[谷中 (台東区)|谷中]] * 東京都[[世田谷区]][[烏山寺町]]（[[北烏山]]） * 東京都[[八王子市]][[寺町 (八王子市)]] ;中部 * [[新潟県]][[上越市]][[寺町 (上越市)]] * 新潟県[[糸魚川市]][[寺町 (糸魚川市)]] * 新潟県[[佐渡市]][[相川町|相川]]上寺町、中寺町、下寺町…上寺町は廃墟だが[[史跡|国指定史跡]]「[[佐渡金山|佐渡金銀山]]」、中寺町と下寺町は[[重要文化的景観]]「佐渡相川の鉱山及び鉱山町の文化的景観」として[[世界遺産]]「[[佐渡島の金山]]」に含まれている * [[石川県]][[金沢市]][[寺町 (金沢市)]] * [[岐阜県]][[岐阜市]][[寺町 (岐阜市)]] * [[愛知県]][[半田市]][[寺町 (半田市)]] * [[三重県]][[桑名市]][[寺町 (桑名市)]] ; 近畿 * [[京都府]][[京都市]][[寺町通]]（[[中京区]]、[[上京区]]）、[[裏寺町通]]（中京区）、[[寺之内]]（上京区） * [[大阪府]][[大阪市]][[北区 (大阪市)|北区]][[同心 (大阪市)|同心]]1丁目、[[与力町 (大阪市)|与力町]]、[[末広町 (大阪市)|末広町]]、[[野崎町 (大阪市)|野崎町]]、[[兎我野町]] * 大阪府大阪市[[中央区 (大阪市)|中央区]][[上本町西]]4 - 5丁目、[[谷町]]8 - 9丁目、[[中寺 (大阪市)]] * 大阪府大阪市[[天王寺区]][[餌差町 (大阪市)|餌差町]]、[[城南寺町]]、[[東高津町]]、[[上本町]]4 - 5丁目、[[生玉町]]、[[生玉寺町]]、[[下寺町 (大阪市)]]、[[夕陽丘町]]、[[六万体町]] * 大阪府[[堺市]][[寺町筋]]（[[堺区]][[錦之町東]] - [[南旅篭町東]]間） * [[兵庫県]][[尼崎市]][[寺町 (尼崎市)]] * [[和歌山県]][[和歌山市]]吹上（[[寺町 (和歌山市)]]） ; 中国 * [[鳥取県]][[鳥取市]][[寺町 (鳥取市)]] * [[島根県]][[松江市]][[寺町 (松江市)]] * [[広島県]][[広島市]][[中区 (広島市)|中区]][[寺町 (広島市)]] ; 四国 * [[徳島県]][[徳島市]][[寺町 (徳島市)]] * 徳島県[[美馬市]][[寺町 (美馬市)]] ; 九州 * [[福岡県]][[福岡市]][[博多区]][[御供所町 (福岡市)|御供所町]]、[[呉服町 (福岡市)|上呉服町]] * 福岡県[[久留米市]][[寺町 (久留米市)]] * [[熊本県]][[人吉市]][[寺町 (人吉市)]] : など
{{地名の曖昧さ回避}} {{デフォルトソート:てらまち}} [[Category:日本の地名]] [[Category:門前町|*てらまち]] [[Category:城下町|*てらまち]]

revision.text:
[[fr:Teramachi]][[ja:寺町]][[zh:寺町]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11458043]] Wikidata name: Teramachi [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:30, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:56, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Confused|Jinaimachi}} '''Teramachi''' (寺町) refers to areas in Japan where [[:en:Buddhist temples in Japan|Buddhist temples in Japan]] are concentrated. This name can be found in cities across Japan. In many [[Walled City|Castle towns]], temples and [[:en:cemeteries|cemeteries]] were grouped on the outskirts of the city to form a defensive line in case of enemy attacks. == Major Teramachi Locations == ; This name can be found in cities across Japan. [[fr:Teramachi]][[ja:寺町]][[zh:寺町]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[da:d:Q11458043]] Wikidata name: Teramachi [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:30, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:56, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Confused|Jinaimachi}} '''Teramachi''' (寺町) refers to areas in Japan where [[:en:Buddhist temples in Japan|Buddhist temples in Japan]] are concentrated. This name can be found in cities across Japan. In many [[Walled City|Castle towns]], temples and [[:en:cemeteries|cemeteries]] were grouped on the outskirts of the city to form a defensive line in case of enemy attacks. == Major Teramachi Locations == ; Tohoku Region * [[:en:Aomori Prefecture|Aomori Prefecture]]: [[:en:Hirosaki|Hirosaki]] - Nishishigemori area ({{ill|Zenrin Street|ja|禅林街|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenrin Street|qq=|1=Zenringai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11591192}}), {{ill|Niideramachi|ja|新寺町 (弘前市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Niideramachi|qq=|1=Shinderamachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11501898}} area * [[:en:Miyagi Prefecture|Miyagi Prefecture]]: [[:en:Sendai|Sendai]] - {{ill|Shintera|ja|新寺 (若林区)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shintera|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Wakabayashi Ward * [[:en:Akita Prefecture|Akita Prefecture]]: [[:en:Akita City|Akita City]] - {{ill|Kyokuhoku|ja|旭北寺町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyokuhoku|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} area ; Kanto Region * [[:en:Chiba Prefecture|Chiba Prefecture]]: [[:en:Funabashi|Funabashi]] - {{ill|Motomachi Teramachi|ja|本町寺町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Motomachi Teramachi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo]]: ** [[:en:Minato City|Minato City]] - [[:en:Mita, Minato, Tokyo|Mita]] Fourth Chome (see [[Tsukino Misaki]]) ** [[:en:Taito City|Taito City]] - [[:en:Yanaka, Tokyo|Yanaka]] ** [[:en:Setagaya|Setagaya]] - {{ill|Karasuyama Teramachi|ja|烏山寺町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Karasuyama Teramachi|qq=|1=Karasuyama Temple Town|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17990240}} ** [[:en:Hachioji|Hachioji]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Hachioji)|ja|寺町 (八王子市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Hachioji)|qq=|1=Teramachi, Hachioji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21019184}} ; Chubu Region * [[:en:Niigata Prefecture|Niigata Prefecture]]: ** [[:en:Joetsu|Joetsu]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Joetsu)|ja|寺町 (上越市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Joetsu)|qq=|1=Teramachi (Joetsu)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q85879611}} ** [[:en:Itoigawa|Itoigawa]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Itoigawa)|ja|寺町 (糸魚川市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Itoigawa)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ** [[:en:Sado, Niigata|Sado, Niigata]] (Aikawa) - [[:en:Aikawa, Niigata|上寺町]], {{ill|Nakashiteramachi|ja|中寺町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakashiteramachi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Shimoteramachi|ja|下寺町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimoteramachi|qq=|1=Shimoteramachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11360787}}. Kamiteramachi is in ruins but part of the [[:en:Historic Sites of Japan|Historic Sites of Japan]] [[:en:Sado mine|Sado Kinzan]]. Nakashiteramachi and Shimoteramachi are part of the [[Important Cultural Landscape]] {{ill|Cultural Landscape of Aikawa|ja|佐渡相川の鉱山及び鉱山町の文化的景観|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cultural Landscape of Aikawa|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and included in the World Heritage Site {{ill|Sado Island Gold Mines|ja|佐渡島の金山|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sado Island Gold Mines|qq=|1=Sado Island Gold Mines|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q127378385}}. * [[:en:Ishikawa Prefecture|Ishikawa Prefecture]]: [[:en:Kanazawa|Kanazawa]] - {{ill|Teramachi [[fr:Teramachi]][[ja:寺町]][[zh:寺町]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[da:d:Q11458043]] Wikidata name: Teramachi [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:30, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:56, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Confused|Jinaimachi}} '''Teramachi''' (寺町) refers to areas in Japan where [[:en:Buddhist temples in Japan|Buddhist temples in Japan]] are concentrated. This name can be found in cities across Japan. In many [[Walled City|Castle towns]], temples and [[:en:cemeteries|cemeteries]] were grouped on the outskirts of the city to form a defensive line in case of enemy attacks. == Major Teramachi Locations == ; Tohoku Region * [[:en:Aomori Prefecture|Aomori Prefecture]]: [[:en:Hirosaki|Hirosaki]] - Nishishigemori area ({{ill|Zenrin Street|ja|禅林街|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenrin Street|1=Zenringai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11591192}}), {{ill|Niideramachi|ja|新寺町 (弘前市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Niideramachi|1=Shinderamachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11501898}} area * [[:en:Miyagi Prefecture|Miyagi Prefecture]]: [[:en:Sendai|Sendai]] - {{ill|Shintera|ja|新寺 (若林区)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shintera|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Wakabayashi Ward * [[:en:Akita Prefecture|Akita Prefecture]]: [[:en:Akita City|Akita City]] - {{ill|Kyokuhoku|ja|旭北寺町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyokuhoku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} area ; Kanto Region * [[:en:Chiba Prefecture|Chiba Prefecture]]: [[:en:Funabashi|Funabashi]] - {{ill|Motomachi Teramachi|ja|本町寺町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Motomachi Teramachi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo]]: ** [[:en:Minato City|Minato City]] - [[:en:Mita, Minato, Tokyo|Mita]] Fourth Chome (see [[Tsukino Misaki]]) ** [[:en:Taito City|Taito City]] - [[:en:Yanaka, Tokyo|Yanaka]] ** [[:en:Setagaya|Setagaya]] - {{ill|Karasuyama Teramachi|ja|烏山寺町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Karasuyama Teramachi|1=Karasuyama Temple Town|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17990240}} ** [[:en:Hachioji|Hachioji]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Hachioji)|ja|寺町 (八王子市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Hachioji)|1=Teramachi, Hachioji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21019184}} ; Chubu Region * [[:en:Niigata Prefecture|Niigata Prefecture]]: ** [[:en:Joetsu|Joetsu]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Joetsu)|ja|寺町 (上越市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Joetsu)|1=Teramachi (Joetsu)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q85879611}} ** [[:en:Itoigawa|Itoigawa]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Itoigawa)|ja|寺町 (糸魚川市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Itoigawa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ** [[:en:Sado, Niigata|Sado, Niigata]] (Aikawa) - [[:en:Aikawa, Niigata|上寺町]], {{ill|Nakashiteramachi|ja|中寺町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakashiteramachi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Shimoteramachi|ja|下寺町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimoteramachi|1=Shimoteramachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11360787}}. Kamiteramachi is in ruins but part of the [[:en:Historic Sites of Japan|Historic Sites of Japan]] [[:en:Sado mine|Sado Kinzan]]. Nakashiteramachi and Shimoteramachi are part of the [[Important Cultural Landscape]] {{ill|Cultural Landscape of Aikawa|ja|佐渡相川の鉱山及び鉱山町の文化的景観|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cultural Landscape of Aikawa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and included in the World Heritage Site {{ill|Sado Island Gold Mines|ja|佐渡島の金山|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sado Island Gold Mines|1=Sado Island Gold Mines|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q127378385}}. * [[:en:Ishikawa Prefecture|Ishikawa Prefecture]]: [[:en:Kanazawa|Kanazawa]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Kanazawa)|ja|寺町 [[fr:Teramachi]][[ja:寺町]][[zh:寺町]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[da:d:Q11458043]] Wikidata name: Teramachi [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:30, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:56, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Confused|Jinaimachi}} '''Teramachi''' (寺町) refers to areas in Japan where [[:en:Buddhist temples in Japan|Buddhist temples in Japan]] are concentrated. This name can be found in cities across Japan. In many [[Walled City|Castle towns]], temples and [[:en:cemeteries|cemeteries]] were grouped on the outskirts of the city to form a defensive line in case of enemy attacks. == Major Teramachi Locations == ; Tohoku Region * [[:en:Aomori Prefecture|Aomori Prefecture]]: [[:en:Hirosaki|Hirosaki]] - Nishishigemori area ({{ill|Zenrin Street|ja|禅林街|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenrin Street|1=Zenringai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11591192}}), {{ill|Niideramachi|ja|新寺町 (弘前市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Niideramachi|1=Shinderamachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11501898}} area * [[:en:Miyagi Prefecture|Miyagi Prefecture]]: [[:en:Sendai|Sendai]] - {{ill|Shintera|ja|新寺 (若林区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shintera|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Wakabayashi Ward * [[:en:Akita Prefecture|Akita Prefecture]]: [[:en:Akita City|Akita City]] - {{ill|Kyokuhoku|ja|旭北寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyokuhoku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} area ; Kanto Region * [[:en:Chiba Prefecture|Chiba Prefecture]]: [[:en:Funabashi|Funabashi]] - {{ill|Motomachi Teramachi|ja|本町寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Motomachi Teramachi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo]]: ** [[:en:Minato City|Minato City]] - [[:en:Mita, Minato, Tokyo|Mita]] Fourth Chome (see [[Tsukino Misaki]]) ** [[:en:Taito City|Taito City]] - [[:en:Yanaka, Tokyo|Yanaka]] ** [[:en:Setagaya|Setagaya]] - {{ill|Karasuyama Teramachi|ja|烏山寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Karasuyama Teramachi|1=Karasuyama Temple Town|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17990240}} ** [[:en:Hachioji|Hachioji]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Hachioji)|ja|寺町 (八王子市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Hachioji)|1=Teramachi, Hachioji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21019184}} ; Chubu Region * [[:en:Niigata Prefecture|Niigata Prefecture]]: ** [[:en:Joetsu|Joetsu]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Joetsu)|ja|寺町 (上越市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Joetsu)|1=Teramachi (Joetsu)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q85879611}} ** [[:en:Itoigawa|Itoigawa]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Itoigawa)|ja|寺町 (糸魚川市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Itoigawa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ** [[:en:Sado, Niigata|Sado, Niigata]] (Aikawa) - [[:en:Aikawa, Niigata|上寺町]], {{ill|Nakashiteramachi|ja|中寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakashiteramachi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Shimoteramachi|ja|下寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimoteramachi|1=Shimoteramachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11360787}}. Kamiteramachi is in ruins but part of the [[:en:Historic Sites of Japan|Historic Sites of Japan]] [[:en:Sado mine|Sado Kinzan]]. revision.text:
[[fr:Teramachi]][[ja:寺町]][[zh:寺町]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[da:d:Q11458043]] Wikidata name: Teramachi [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:30, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:56, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Confused|Jinaimachi}} '''Teramachi''' (寺町) refers to areas in Japan where [[:en:Buddhist temples in Japan|Buddhist temples in Japan]] are concentrated. This name can be found in cities across Japan. In many [[Walled City|Castle towns]], temples and [[:en:cemeteries|cemeteries]] were grouped on the outskirts of the city to form a defensive line in case of enemy attacks. == Major Teramachi Locations == ; Tohoku Region * [[:en:Aomori Prefecture|Aomori Prefecture]]: [[:en:Hirosaki|Hirosaki]] - Nishishigemori area ({{ill|Zenrin Street|ja|禅林街|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenrin Street|1=Zenringai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11591192}}), {{ill|Niideramachi|ja|新寺町 (弘前市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Niideramachi|1=Shinderamachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11501898}} area * [[:en:Miyagi Prefecture|Miyagi Prefecture]]: [[:en:Sendai|Sendai]] - {{ill|Shintera|ja|新寺 (若林区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shintera|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Wakabayashi Ward * [[:en:Akita Prefecture|Akita Prefecture]]: [[:en:Akita City|Akita City]] - {{ill|Kyokuhoku|ja|旭北寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyokuhoku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} area ; Kanto Region * [[:en:Chiba Prefecture|Chiba Prefecture]]: [[:en:Funabashi|Funabashi]] - {{ill|Motomachi Teramachi|ja|本町寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Motomachi Teramachi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo]]: ** [[:en:Minato City|Minato City]] - [[:en:Mita, Minato, Tokyo|Mita]] Fourth Chome (see [[Tsukino Misaki]]) ** [[:en:Taito City|Taito City]] - [[:en:Yanaka, Tokyo|Yanaka]] ** [[:en:Setagaya|Setagaya]] - {{ill|Karasuyama Teramachi|ja|烏山寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Karasuyama Teramachi|1=Karasuyama Temple Town|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17990240}} ** [[:en:Hachioji|Hachioji]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Hachioji)|ja|寺町 (八王子市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Hachioji)|1=Teramachi, Hachioji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21019184}} ; Chubu Region * [[:en:Niigata Prefecture|Niigata Prefecture]]: ** [[:en:Joetsu|Joetsu]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Joetsu)|ja|寺町 (上越市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Joetsu)|1=Teramachi (Joetsu)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q85879611}} ** [[:en:Itoigawa|Itoigawa]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Itoigawa)|ja|寺町 (糸魚川市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Itoigawa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ** [[:en:Sado, Niigata|Sado, Niigata]] (Aikawa) - [[:en:Aikawa, Niigata|上寺町]], {{ill|Nakashiteramachi|ja|中寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakashiteramachi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Shimoteramachi|ja|下寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimoteramachi|1=Shimoteramachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11360787}}. Kamiteramachi is in ruins but part of the [[:en:Historic Sites of Japan|Historic Sites of Japan]] [[:en:Sado mine|Sado Kinzan]]. Nakashiteramachi and Shimoteramachi are part of the [[Important Cultural Landscape]] {{ill|Cultural Landscape of Aikawa|ja|佐渡相川の鉱山及び鉱山町の文化的景観|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cultural Landscape of Aikawa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and included in the World Heritage Site {{ill|Sado Island Gold Mines|ja|佐渡島の金山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sado Island Gold Mines|1=Sado Island Gold Mines|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q127378385}}. * [[:en:Ishikawa Prefecture|Ishikawa Prefecture]]: [[:en:Kanazawa|Kanazawa]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Kanazawa)|ja|寺町 [[fr:Teramachi]][[ja:寺町]][[zh:寺町]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[da:d:Q11458043]] Wikidata name: Teramachi [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:30, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:56, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Confused|Jinaimachi}} '''Teramachi''' (寺町) refers to areas in Japan where [[:en:Buddhist temples in Japan|Buddhist temples in Japan]] are concentrated. This name can be found in cities across Japan. In many [[Walled City|Castle towns]], temples and [[:en:cemeteries|cemeteries]] were grouped on the outskirts of the city to form a defensive line in case of enemy attacks. == Major Teramachi Locations == ; Tohoku Region * [[:en:Aomori Prefecture|Aomori Prefecture]]: [[:en:Hirosaki|Hirosaki]] - Nishishigemori area ({{ill|Zenrin Street|ja|禅林街|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenrin Street|1=Zenringai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11591192}}), {{ill|Niideramachi|ja|新寺町 (弘前市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Niideramachi|1=Shinderamachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11501898}} area * [[:en:Miyagi Prefecture|Miyagi Prefecture]]: [[:en:Sendai|Sendai]] - {{ill|Shintera|ja|新寺 (若林区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shintera|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Wakabayashi Ward * [[:en:Akita Prefecture|Akita Prefecture]]: [[:en:Akita City|Akita City]] - {{ill|Kyokuhoku|ja|旭北寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyokuhoku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} area ; Kanto Region * [[:en:Chiba Prefecture|Chiba Prefecture]]: [[:en:Funabashi|Funabashi]] - {{ill|Motomachi Teramachi|ja|本町寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Motomachi Teramachi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo]]: ** [[:en:Minato City|Minato City]] - [[:en:Mita, Minato, Tokyo|Mita]] Fourth Chome (see [[Tsukino Misaki]]) ** [[:en:Taito City|Taito City]] - [[:en:Yanaka, Tokyo|Yanaka]] ** [[:en:Setagaya|Setagaya]] - {{ill|Karasuyama Teramachi|ja|烏山寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Karasuyama Teramachi|1=Karasuyama Temple Town|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17990240}} ** [[:en:Hachioji|Hachioji]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Hachioji)|ja|寺町 (八王子市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Hachioji)|1=Teramachi, Hachioji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21019184}} ; Chubu Region * [[:en:Niigata Prefecture|Niigata Prefecture]]: ** [[:en:Joetsu|Joetsu]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Joetsu)|ja|寺町 (上越市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Joetsu)|1=Teramachi (Joetsu)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q85879611}} ** [[:en:Itoigawa|Itoigawa]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Itoigawa)|ja|寺町 (糸魚川市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Itoigawa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ** [[:en:Sado, Niigata|Sado, Niigata]] (Aikawa) - [[:en:Aikawa, Niigata|上寺町]], {{ill|Nakashiteramachi|ja|中寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakashiteramachi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Shimoteramachi|ja|下寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimoteramachi|1=Shimoteramachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11360787}}. Kamiteramachi is in ruins but part of the [[:en:Historic Sites of Japan|Historic Sites of Japan]] [[:en:Sado mine|Sado Kinzan]]. Nakashiteramachi and Shimoteramachi are part of the [[Important Cultural Landscape]] {{ill|Cultural Landscape of Aikawa|ja|佐渡相川の鉱山及び鉱山町の文化的景観|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cultural Landscape of Aikawa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and included in the World Heritage Site {{ill|Sado Island Gold Mines|ja|佐渡島の金山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sado Island Gold Mines|1=Sado Island Gold Mines|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q127378385}}. * [[:en:Ishikawa Prefecture|Ishikawa Prefecture]]: [[:en:Kanazawa|Kanazawa]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Kanazawa)|ja|寺町 [[fr:Teramachi]][[ja:寺町]][[zh:寺町]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[da:d:Q11458043]] Wikidata name: Teramachi [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:30, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:56, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Confused|Jinaimachi}} '''Teramachi''' (寺町) refers to areas in Japan where [[:en:Buddhist temples in Japan|Buddhist temples in Japan]] are concentrated. This name can be found in cities across Japan. In many [[Walled City|Castle towns]], temples and [[:en:cemeteries|cemeteries]] were grouped on the outskirts of the city to form a defensive line in case of enemy attacks. == Major Teramachi Locations == ; Tohoku Region * [[:en:Aomori Prefecture|Aomori Prefecture]]: [[:en:Hirosaki|Hirosaki]] - Nishishigemori area ({{ill|Zenrin Street|ja|禅林街|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenrin Street|1=Zenringai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11591192}}), {{ill|Niideramachi|ja|新寺町 (弘前市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Niideramachi|1=Shinderamachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11501898}} area * [[:en:Miyagi Prefecture|Miyagi Prefecture]]: [[:en:Sendai|Sendai]] - {{ill|Shintera|ja|新寺 (若林区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shintera|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Wakabayashi Ward * [[:en:Akita Prefecture|Akita Prefecture]]: [[:en:Akita City|Akita City]] - {{ill|Kyokuhoku|ja|旭北寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyokuhoku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} area ; Kanto Region * [[:en:Chiba Prefecture|Chiba Prefecture]]: [[:en:Funabashi|Funabashi]] - {{ill|Motomachi Teramachi|ja|本町寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Motomachi Teramachi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo]]: ** [[:en:Minato City|Minato City]] - [[:en:Mita, Minato, Tokyo|Mita]] Fourth Chome (see [[Tsukino Misaki]]) ** [[:en:Taito City|Taito City]] - [[:en:Yanaka, Tokyo|Yanaka]] ** [[:en:Setagaya|Setagaya]] - {{ill|Karasuyama Teramachi|ja|烏山寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Karasuyama Teramachi|1=Karasuyama Temple Town|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17990240}} ** [[:en:Hachioji|Hachioji]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Hachioji)|ja|寺町 (八王子市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Hachioji)|1=Teramachi, Hachioji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21019184}} ; Chubu Region * [[:en:Niigata Prefecture|Niigata Prefecture]]: ** [[:en:Joetsu|Joetsu]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Joetsu)|ja|寺町 (上越市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Joetsu)|1=Teramachi (Joetsu)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q85879611}} ** [[:en:Itoigawa|Itoigawa]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Itoigawa)|ja|寺町 (糸魚川市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Itoigawa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ** [[:en:Sado, Niigata|Sado, Niigata]] (Aikawa) - [[:en:Aikawa, Niigata|上寺町]], {{ill|Nakashiteramachi|ja|中寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakashiteramachi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Shimoteramachi|ja|下寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimoteramachi|1=Shimoteramachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11360787}}. Kamiteramachi is in ruins but part of the [[:en:Historic Sites of Japan|Historic Sites of Japan]] [[:en:Sado mine|Sado Kinzan]]. Nakashiteramachi and Shimoteramachi are part of the [[Important Cultural Landscape]] {{ill|Cultural Landscape of Aikawa|ja|佐渡相川の鉱山及び鉱山町の文化的景観|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cultural Landscape of Aikawa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and included in the World Heritage Site {{ill|Sado Island Gold Mines|ja|佐渡島の金山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sado Island Gold Mines|1=Sado Island Gold Mines|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q127378385}}. * [[:en:Ishikawa Prefecture|Ishikawa Prefecture]]: [[:en:Kanazawa|Kanazawa]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Kanazawa)|ja|寺町 [[fr:Teramachi]][[ja:寺町]][[zh:寺町]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[da:d:Q11458043]] Wikidata name: Teramachi [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:30, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:56, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Confused|Jinaimachi}} '''Teramachi''' (寺町) refers to areas in Japan where [[:en:Buddhist temples in Japan|Buddhist temples in Japan]] are concentrated. This name can be found in cities across Japan. In many [[Walled City|Castle towns]], temples and [[:en:cemeteries|cemeteries]] were grouped on the outskirts of the city to form a defensive line in case of enemy attacks. == Major Teramachi Locations == ; Tohoku Region * [[:en:Aomori Prefecture|Aomori Prefecture]]: [[:en:Hirosaki|Hirosaki]] - Nishishigemori area ({{ill|Zenrin Street|ja|禅林街|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenrin Street|1=Zenringai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11591192}}), {{ill|Niideramachi|ja|新寺町 (弘前市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Niideramachi|1=Shinderamachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11501898}} area * [[:en:Miyagi Prefecture|Miyagi Prefecture]]: [[:en:Sendai|Sendai]] - {{ill|Shintera|ja|新寺 (若林区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shintera|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Wakabayashi Ward * [[:en:Akita Prefecture|Akita Prefecture]]: [[:en:Akita City|Akita City]] - {{ill|Kyokuhoku|ja|旭北寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyokuhoku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} area ; This name can be found in cities across Japan. In many [[Walled City|Castle towns]], temples and [[:en:cemeteries|cemeteries]] were grouped on the outskirts of the city to form a defensive line in case of enemy attacks. == Major Teramachi Locations == ; Tohoku Region * [[:en:Aomori Prefecture|Aomori Prefecture]]: [[:en:Hirosaki|Hirosaki]] - Nishishigemori area ({{ill|Zenrin Street|ja|禅林街|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenrin Street|1=Zenringai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11591192}}), {{ill|Niideramachi|ja|新寺町 (弘前市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Niideramachi|1=Shinderamachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11501898}} area * [[:en:Miyagi Prefecture|Miyagi Prefecture]]: [[:en:Sendai|Sendai]] - {{ill|Shintera|ja|新寺 (若林区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shintera|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Wakabayashi Ward * [[:en:Akita Prefecture|Akita Prefecture]]: [[:en:Akita City|Akita City]] - {{ill|Kyokuhoku|ja|旭北寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyokuhoku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} area ; [[fr:Teramachi]][[ja:寺町]][[zh:寺町]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[da:d:Q11458043]] Wikidata name: Teramachi [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:30, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:56, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Confused|Jinaimachi}} '''Teramachi''' (寺町) refers to areas in Japan where [[:en:Buddhist temples in Japan|Buddhist temples in Japan]] are concentrated. This name can be found in cities across Japan. In many [[Walled City|Castle towns]], temples and [[:en:cemeteries|cemeteries]] were grouped on the outskirts of the city to form a defensive line in case of enemy attacks. == Major Teramachi Locations == ; Tohoku Region * [[:en:Aomori Prefecture|Aomori Prefecture]]: [[:en:Hirosaki|Hirosaki]] - Nishishigemori area ({{ill|Zenrin Street|ja|禅林街|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenrin Street|1=Zenringai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11591192}}), {{ill|Niideramachi|ja|新寺町 (弘前市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Niideramachi|1=Shinderamachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11501898}} area * [[:en:Miyagi Prefecture|Miyagi Prefecture]]: [[:en:Sendai|Sendai]] - {{ill|Shintera|ja|新寺 (若林区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shintera|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Wakabayashi Ward * [[:en:Akita Prefecture|Akita Prefecture]]: [[:en:Akita City|Akita City]] - {{ill|Kyokuhoku|ja|旭北寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyokuhoku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} area ; Kanto Region * [[:en:Chiba Prefecture|Chiba Prefecture]]: [[:en:Funabashi|Funabashi]] - {{ill|Motomachi Teramachi|ja|本町寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Motomachi Teramachi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo]]: ** [[:en:Minato City|Minato City]] - [[:en:Mita, Minato, Tokyo|Mita]] Fourth Chome (see [[Tsukino Misaki]]) ** [[:en:Taito City|Taito City]] - [[:en:Yanaka, Tokyo|Yanaka]] ** [[:en:Setagaya|Setagaya]] - {{ill|Karasuyama Teramachi|ja|烏山寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Karasuyama Teramachi|1=Karasuyama Temple Town|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17990240}} ** [[:en:Hachioji|Hachioji]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Hachioji)|ja|寺町 (八王子市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Hachioji)|1=Teramachi, Hachioji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21019184}} ; Chubu Region * [[:en:Niigata Prefecture|Niigata Prefecture]]: ** [[:en:Joetsu|Joetsu]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Joetsu)|ja|寺町 (上越市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Joetsu)|1=Teramachi (Joetsu)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q85879611}} ** [[:en:Itoigawa|Itoigawa]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Itoigawa)|ja|寺町 (糸魚川市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Itoigawa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ** [[:en:Sado, Niigata|Sado, Niigata]] (Aikawa) - [[:en:Aikawa, Niigata|上寺町]], {{ill|Nakashiteramachi|ja|中寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakashiteramachi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Shimoteramachi|ja|下寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimoteramachi|1=Shimoteramachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11360787}}. Kamiteramachi is in ruins but part of the [[:en:Historic Sites of Japan|Historic Sites of Japan]] [[:en:Sado mine|Sado Kinzan]]. Nakashiteramachi and Shimoteramachi are part of the [[Important Cultural Landscape]] {{ill|Cultural Landscape of Aikawa|ja|佐渡相川の鉱山及び鉱山町の文化的景観|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cultural Landscape of Aikawa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and included in the World Heritage Site {{ill|Sado Island Gold Mines|ja|佐渡島の金山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sado Island Gold Mines|1=Sado Island Gold Mines|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q127378385}}. * [[:en:Ishikawa Prefecture|Ishikawa Prefecture]]: [[:en:Kanazawa|Kanazawa]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Kanazawa)|ja|寺町 [[fr:Teramachi]][[ja:寺町]][[zh:寺町]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[da:d:Q11458043]] Wikidata name: Teramachi [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:30, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:56, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Confused|Jinaimachi}} '''Teramachi''' (寺町) refers to areas in Japan where [[:en:Buddhist temples in Japan|Buddhist temples in Japan]] are concentrated. This name can be found in cities across Japan. In many [[Walled City|Castle towns]], temples and [[:en:cemeteries|cemeteries]] were grouped on the outskirts of the city to form a defensive line in case of enemy attacks. == Major Teramachi Locations == ; Tohoku Region * [[:en:Aomori Prefecture|Aomori Prefecture]]: [[:en:Hirosaki|Hirosaki]] - Nishishigemori area ({{ill|Zenrin Street|ja|禅林街|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenrin Street|1=Zenringai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11591192}}), {{ill|Niideramachi|ja|新寺町 (弘前市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Niideramachi|1=Shinderamachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11501898}} area * [[:en:Miyagi Prefecture|Miyagi Prefecture]]: [[:en:Sendai|Sendai]] - {{ill|Shintera|ja|新寺 (若林区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shintera|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Wakabayashi Ward * [[:en:Akita Prefecture|Akita Prefecture]]: [[:en:Akita City|Akita City]] - {{ill|Kyokuhoku|ja|旭北寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyokuhoku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} area ; Kanto Region * [[:en:Chiba Prefecture|Chiba Prefecture]]: [[:en:Funabashi|Funabashi]] - {{ill|Motomachi Teramachi|ja|本町寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Motomachi Teramachi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo]]: ** [[:en:Minato City|Minato City]] - [[:en:Mita, Minato, Tokyo|Mita]] Fourth Chome (see [[Tsukino Misaki]]) ** [[:en:Taito City|Taito City]] - [[:en:Yanaka, Tokyo|Yanaka]] ** [[:en:Setagaya|Setagaya]] - {{ill|Karasuyama Teramachi|ja|烏山寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Karasuyama Teramachi|1=Karasuyama Temple Town|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17990240}} ** [[:en:Hachioji|Hachioji]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Hachioji)|ja|寺町 (八王子市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Hachioji)|1=Teramachi, Hachioji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21019184}} ; Chubu Region * [[:en:Niigata Prefecture|Niigata Prefecture]]: ** [[:en:Joetsu|Joetsu]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Joetsu)|ja|寺町 (上越市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Joetsu)|1=Teramachi (Joetsu)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q85879611}} ** [[:en:Itoigawa|Itoigawa]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Itoigawa)|ja|寺町 (糸魚川市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Itoigawa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ** [[:en:Sado, Niigata|Sado, Niigata]] (Aikawa) - [[:en:Aikawa, Niigata|上寺町]], {{ill|Nakashiteramachi|ja|中寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakashiteramachi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Shimoteramachi|ja|下寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimoteramachi|1=Shimoteramachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11360787}}. Kamiteramachi is in ruins but part of the [[:en:Historic Sites of Japan|Historic Sites of Japan]] [[:en:Sado mine|Sado Kinzan]]. Nakashiteramachi and Shimoteramachi are part of the [[Important Cultural Landscape]] {{ill|Cultural Landscape of Aikawa|ja|佐渡相川の鉱山及び鉱山町の文化的景観|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cultural Landscape of Mines|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q127378385}}. * [[:en:Ishikawa Prefecture|Ishikawa Prefecture]]: [[:en:Kanazawa|Kanazawa]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Kanazawa)|ja|寺町 revision.text:
[[fr:Teramachi]][[ja:寺町]][[zh:寺町]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[da:d:Q11458043]] Wikidata name: Teramachi [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:30, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:56, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Confused|Jinaimachi}} '''Teramachi''' (寺町) refers to areas in Japan where [[:en:Buddhist temples in Japan|Buddhist temples in Japan]] are concentrated. This name can be found in cities across Japan. In many [[Walled City|Castle towns]], temples and [[:en:cemeteries|cemeteries]] were grouped on the outskirts of the city to form a defensive line in case of enemy attacks. == Major Teramachi Locations == ; Tohoku Region * [[:en:Aomori Prefecture|Aomori Prefecture]]: [[:en:Hirosaki|Hirosaki]] - Nishishigemori area ({{ill|Zenrin Street|ja|禅林街|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenrin Street|1=Zenringai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11591192}}), {{ill|Niideramachi|ja|新寺町 (弘前市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Niideramachi|1=Shinderamachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11501898}} area * [[:en:Miyagi Prefecture|Miyagi Prefecture]]: [[:en:Sendai|Sendai]] - {{ill|Shintera|ja|新寺 (若林区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shintera|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Wakabayashi Ward * [[:en:Akita Prefecture|Akita Prefecture]]: [[:en:Akita City|Akita City]] - {{ill|Kyokuhoku|ja|旭北寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyokuhoku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} area ; Kanto Region * [[:en:Chiba Prefecture|Chiba Prefecture]]: [[:en:Funabashi|Funabashi]] - {{ill|Motomachi Teramachi|ja|本町寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Motomachi Teramachi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo]]: ** [[:en:Minato City|Minato City]] - [[:en:Mita, Minato, Tokyo|Mita]] Fourth Chome (see [[Tsukino Misaki]]) ** [[:en:Taito City|Taito City]] - [[:en:Yanaka, Tokyo|Yanaka]] ** [[:en:Setagaya|Setagaya]] - {{ill|Karasuyama Teramachi|ja|烏山寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Karasuyama Teramachi|1=Karasuyama Temple Town|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17990240}} ** [[:en:Hachioji|Hachioji]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Hachioji)|ja|寺町 (八王子市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Hachioji)|1=Teramachi, Hachioji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21019184}} ; Chubu Region * [[:en:Niigata Prefecture|Niigata Prefecture]]: ** [[:en:Joetsu|Joetsu]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Joetsu)|ja|寺町 (上越市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Joetsu)|1=Teramachi (Joetsu)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q85879611}} ** [[:en:Itoigawa|Itoigawa]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Itoigawa)|ja|寺町 (糸魚川市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Itoigawa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ** [[:en:Sado, Niigata|Sado, Niigata]] (Aikawa) - [[:en:Aikawa, Niigata|上寺町]], {{ill|Nakashiteramachi|ja|中寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakashiteramachi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Shimoteramachi|ja|下寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimoteramachi|1=Shimoteramachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11360787}}. Kamiteramachi is in ruins but part of the [[:en:Historic Sites of Japan|Historic Sites of Japan]] [[:en:Sado mine|Sado Kinzan]]. Nakashiteramachi and Shimoteramachi are part of the [[Important Cultural Landscape]] {{ill|Cultural Landscape of Aikawa|ja|佐渡相川の鉱山及び鉱山町の文化的景観|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cultural Landscape of Aikawa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and included in the World Heritage Site {{ill|Sado Island Gold Mines|ja|佐渡島の金山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sado Island Gold Mines|1=Sado Island Gold Mines|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q127378385}}. * [[:en:Ishikawa Prefecture|Ishikawa Prefecture]]: [[:en:Kanazawa|Kanazawa]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Kanazawa)|ja|寺町 [[fr:Teramachi]][[ja:寺町]][[zh:寺町]] [[fr:Teramachi]][[ja:寺町]][[zh:寺町]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[da:d:Q11458043]] Wikidata name: Teramachi [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:30, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:56, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Confused|Jinaimachi}} '''Teramachi''' (寺町) refers to areas in Japan where [[:en:Buddhist temples in Japan|Buddhist temples in Japan]] are concentrated. This name can be found in cities across Japan. In many [[Walled City|Castle towns]], temples and [[:en:cemeteries|cemeteries]] were grouped on the outskirts of the city to form a defensive line in case of enemy attacks. == Major Teramachi Locations == ; Tohoku Region * [[:en:Aomori Prefecture|Aomori Prefecture]]: [[:en:Hirosaki|Hirosaki]] - Nishishigemori area ({{ill|Zenrin Street|ja|禅林街|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenrin Street|1=Zenringai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11591192}}), {{ill|Niideramachi|ja|新寺町 (弘前市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Niideramachi|1=Shinderamachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11501898}} area * [[:en:Miyagi Prefecture|Miyagi Prefecture]]: [[:en:Sendai|Sendai]] - {{ill|Shintera|ja|新寺 (若林区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shintera|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Wakabayashi Ward * [[:en:Akita Prefecture|Akita Prefecture]]: [[:en:Akita City|Akita City]] - {{ill|Kyokuhoku|ja|旭北寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyokuhoku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} area ; Kanto Region * [[:en:Chiba Prefecture|Chiba Prefecture]]: [[:en:Funabashi|Funabashi]] - {{ill|Motomachi Teramachi|ja|本町寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Motomachi Teramachi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo]]: ** [[:en:Minato City|Minato City]] - [[:en:Mita, Minato, Tokyo|Mita]] Fourth Chome (see [[Tsukino Misaki]]) ** [[:en:Taito City|Taito City]] - [[:en:Yanaka, Tokyo|Yanaka]] ** [[:en:Setagaya|Setagaya]] - {{ill|Karasuyama Teramachi|ja|烏山寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Karasuyama Teramachi|1=Karasuyama Temple Town|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17990240}} ** [[:en:Hachioji|Hachioji]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Hachioji)|ja|寺町 (八王子市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Hachioji)|1=Teramachi, Hachioji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21019184}} ; Chubu Region * [[:en:Niigata Prefecture|Niigata Prefecture]]: ** [[:en:Joetsu|Joetsu]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Joetsu)|ja|寺町 (上越市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Joetsu)|1=Teramachi (Joetsu)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q85879611}} ** [[:en:Itoigawa|Itoigawa]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Itoigawa)|ja|寺町 (糸魚川市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Itoigawa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ** [[:en:Sado, Niigata|Sado, Niigata]] (Aikawa) - [[:en:Aikawa, Niigata|上寺町]], {{ill|Nakashiteramachi|ja|中寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakashiteramachi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Shimoteramachi|ja|下寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimoteramachi|1=Shimoteramachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11360787}}. Kamiteramachi is in ruins but part of the [[:en:Historic Sites of Japan|Historic Sites of Japan]] [[:en:Sado mine|Sado Kinzan]]. Nakashiteramachi and Shimoteramachi are part of the [[Important Cultural Landscape]] {{ill|Cultural Landscape of Aikawa|ja|佐渡相川の鉱山及び鉱山町の文化的景観|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cultural Landscape of Mines|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q127378385}}. * [[:en:Ishikawa Prefecture|Ishikawa Prefecture]]: [[:en:Kanazawa|Kanazawa]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Kanazawa)|ja|寺町 [[fr:Teramachi]][[ja:寺町]][[zh:寺町]] [[fr:Teramachi]][[ja:寺町]][[zh:寺町]] [[fr:Teramachi]][[ja:寺町]][[zh:寺町]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[da:d:Q11458043]] Wikidata name: Teramachi [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:30, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:56, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Confused|Jinaimachi}} '''Teramachi''' (寺町) refers to areas in Japan where [[:en:Buddhist temples in Japan|Buddhist temples in Japan]] are concentrated. This name can be found in cities across Japan. In many [[Walled City|Castle towns]], temples and [[:en:cemeteries|cemeteries]] were grouped on the outskirts of the city to form a defensive line in case of enemy attacks. == Major Teramachi Locations == ; Tohoku Region * [[:en:Aomori Prefecture|Aomori Prefecture]]: [[:en:Hirosaki|Hirosaki]] - Nishishigemori area ({{ill|Zenrin Street|ja|禅林街|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenrin Street|1=Zenringai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11591192}}), {{ill|Niideramachi|ja|新寺町 (弘前市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Niideramachi|1=Shinderamachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11501898}} area * [[:en:Miyagi Prefecture|Miyagi Prefecture]]: [[:en:Sendai|Sendai]] - {{ill|Shintera|ja|新寺 (若林区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shintera|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Wakabayashi Ward * [[:en:Akita Prefecture|Akita Prefecture]]: [[:en:Akita City|Akita City]] - {{ill|Kyokuhoku|ja|旭北寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyokuhoku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} area ; Kanto Region * [[:en:Chiba Prefecture|Chiba Prefecture]]: [[:en:Funabashi|Funabashi]] - {{ill|Motomachi Teramachi|ja|本町寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Motomachi Teramachi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo]]: ** [[:en:Minato City|Minato City]] - [[:en:Mita, Minato, Tokyo|Mita]] Fourth Chome (see [[Tsukino Misaki]]) ** [[:en:Taito City|Taito City]] - [[:en:Yanaka, Tokyo|Yanaka]] ** [[:en:Setagaya|Setagaya]] - {{ill|Karasuyama Teramachi|ja|烏山寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Karasuyama Teramachi|1=Karasuyama Temple Town|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17990240}} ** [[:en:Hachioji|Hachioji]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Hachioji)|ja|寺町 (八王子市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Hachioji)|1=Teramachi, Hachioji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21019184}} ; Chubu Region * [[:en:Niigata Prefecture|Niigata Prefecture]]: ** [[:en:Joetsu|Joetsu]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Joetsu)|ja|寺町 (上越市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Joetsu)|1=Teramachi (Joetsu)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q85879611}} ** [[:en:Itoigawa|Itoigawa]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Itoigawa)|ja|寺町 (糸魚川市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Itoigawa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ** [[:en:Sado, Niigata|Sado, Niigata]] (Aikawa) - [[:en:Aikawa, Niigata|上寺町]], {{ill|Nakashiteramachi|ja|中寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakashiteramachi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Shimoteramachi|ja|下寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimoteramachi|1=Shimoteramachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11360787}}. Kamiteramachi is in ruins but part of the [[:en:Historic Sites of Japan|Historic Sites of Japan]] [[:en:Sado mine|Sado Kinzan]]. Nakashiteramachi and Shimoteramachi are part of the [[Important Cultural Landscape]] {{ill|Cultural Landscape of Aikawa|ja|佐渡相川の鉱山及び鉱山町の文化的景観|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cultural Landscape of Aikawa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and included in the World Heritage Site {{ill|Sado Island Gold Mines|ja|佐渡島の金山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sado Island Gold Mines|1=Sado Island Gold Mines|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q127378385}}. * [[:en:Ishikawa Prefecture|Ishikawa Prefecture]]: [[:en:Kanazawa|Kanazawa]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Kanazawa)|ja|寺町 [[fr:Teramachi]][[ja:寺町]][[zh:寺町]] [[fr:Teramachi]][[ja:寺町]][[zh:寺町]] [[fr:Teramachi]][[ja:寺町]][[zh:寺町]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11458043]] Wikidata name: Teramachi [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:30, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:56, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Confused|Jinaimachi}} '''Teramachi''' (寺町) refers to areas in Japan where [[:en:Buddhist temples in Japan|Buddhist temples in Japan]] are concentrated. This name can be found in cities across Japan. In many [[Walled City|Castle towns]], temples and [[:en:cemeteries|cemeteries]] were grouped on the outskirts of the city to form a defensive line in case of enemy attacks. == Major Teramachi Locations == ; Tohoku Region * [[:en:Aomori Prefecture|Aomori Prefecture]]: [[:en:Hirosaki|Hirosaki]] - Nishishigemori area ({{ill|Zenrin Street|ja|禅林街|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenrin Street|1=Zenringai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11591192}}), {{ill|Niideramachi|ja|新寺町 (弘前市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Niideramachi|1=Shinderamachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11501898}} area * [[:en:Miyagi Prefecture|Miyagi Prefecture]]: [[:en:Sendai|Sendai]] - {{ill|Shintera|ja|新寺 (若林区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shintera|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Wakabayashi Ward * [[:en:Akita Prefecture|Akita Prefecture]]: [[:en:Akita City|Akita City]] - {{ill|Kyokuhoku|ja|旭北寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyokuhoku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} area ; Kanto Region * [[:en:Chiba Prefecture|Chiba Prefecture]]: [[:en:Funabashi|Funabashi]] - {{ill|Motomachi Teramachi|ja|本町寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Motomachi Teramachi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo]]: ** [[:en:Minato City|Minato City]] - [[:en:Mita, Minato, Tokyo|Mita]] Fourth Chome (see [[Tsukino Misaki]]) ** [[:en:Taito City|Taito City]] - [[:en:Yanaka, Tokyo|Yanaka]] ** [[:en:Setagaya|Setagaya]] - {{ill|Karasuyama Teramachi|ja|烏山寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Karasuyama Teramachi|1=Karasuyama Temple Town|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17990240}} ** [[:en:Hachioji|Hachioji]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Hachioji)|ja|寺町 (八王子市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Hachioji)|1=Teramachi, Hachioji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21019184}} ; Chubu Region * [[:en:Niigata Prefecture|Niigata Prefecture]]: ** [[:en:Joetsu|Joetsu]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Joetsu)|ja|寺町 (上越市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Joetsu)|1=Teramachi (Joetsu)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q85879611}} ** [[:en:Itoigawa|Itoigawa]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Itoigawa)|ja|寺町 (糸魚川市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Itoigawa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ** [[:en:Sado, Niigata|Sado, Niigata]] (Aikawa) - [[:en:Aikawa, Niigata|上寺町]], {{ill|Nakashiteramachi|ja|中寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakashiteramachi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Shimoteramachi|ja|下寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimoteramachi|1=Shimoteramachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11360787}}. Kamiteramachi is in ruins but part of the [[:en:Historic Sites of Japan|Historic Sites of Japan]] [[:en:Sado mine|Sado Kinzan]]. Nakashiteramachi and Shimoteramachi are part of the [[Important Cultural Landscape]] {{ill|Cultural Landscape of Aikawa|ja|佐渡相川の鉱山及び鉱山町の文化的景観|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cultural Landscape of Aikawa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and included in the World Heritage Site {{ill|Sado Island Gold Mines|ja|佐渡島の金山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sado Island Gold Mines|1=Sado Island Gold Mines|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q127378385}}. * [[:en:Ishikawa Prefecture|Ishikawa Prefecture]]: [[:en:Kanazawa|Kanazawa]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Kanazawa)|ja|寺町 (金沢市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Kanazawa)|1=Teramachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q84921594}} * [[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]]: [[:en:Gifu|Gifu]] - [[fr:Teramachi]][[ja:寺町]][[zh:寺町]] [[fr:Teramachi]][[ja:寺町]][[zh:寺町]] [[fr:Teramachi]][[ja:寺町]][[zh:寺町]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11458043]] Wikidata name: Teramachi [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:30, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:56, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Confused|Jinaimachi}} '''Teramachi''' (寺町) refers to areas in Japan where [[:en:Buddhist temples in Japan|Buddhist temples in Japan]] are concentrated. This name can be found in cities across Japan. In many [[Walled City|Castle towns]], temples and [[:en:cemeteries|cemeteries]] were grouped on the outskirts of the city to form a defensive line in case of enemy attacks. == Major Teramachi Locations == ; Tohoku Region * [[:en:Aomori Prefecture|Aomori Prefecture]]: [[:en:Hirosaki|Hirosaki]] - Nishishigemori area ({{ill|Zenrin Street|ja|禅林街|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenrin Street|1=Zenringai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11591192}}), {{ill|Niideramachi|ja|新寺町 (弘前市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Niideramachi|1=Shinderamachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11501898}} area * [[:en:Miyagi Prefecture|Miyagi Prefecture]]: [[:en:Sendai|Sendai]] - {{ill|Shintera|ja|新寺 (若林区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shintera|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Wakabayashi Ward * [[:en:Akita Prefecture|Akita Prefecture]]: [[:en:Akita City|Akita City]] - {{ill|Kyokuhoku|ja|旭北寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyokuhoku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} area ; Kanto Region * [[:en:Chiba Prefecture|Chiba Prefecture]]: [[:en:Funabashi|Funabashi]] - {{ill|Motomachi Teramachi|ja|本町寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Motomachi Teramachi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo]]: ** [[:en:Minato City|Minato City]] - [[:en:Mita, Minato, Tokyo|Mita]] Fourth Chome (see [[Tsukino Misaki]]) ** [[:en:Taito City|Taito City]] - [[:en:Yanaka, Tokyo|Yanaka]] ** [[:en:Setagaya|Setagaya]] - {{ill|Karasuyama Teramachi|ja|烏山寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Karasuyama Teramachi|1=Karasuyama Temple Town|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17990240}} ** [[:en:Hachioji|Hachioji]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Hachioji)|ja|寺町 (八王子市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Hachioji)|1=Teramachi, Hachioji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21019184}} ; Kamiteramachi is in ruins but part of the [[:en:Historic Sites of Japan|Historic Sites of Japan]] [[:en:Sado mine|Sado Kinzan]]. revision.text:
[[fr:Teramachi]][[ja:寺町]][[zh:寺町]] [[fr:Teramachi]][[ja:寺町]][[zh:寺町]] [[fr:Teramachi]][[ja:寺町]][[zh:寺町]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11458043]] Wikidata name: Teramachi [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:30, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:56, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Confused|Jinaimachi}} '''Teramachi''' (寺町) refers to areas in Japan where [[:en:Buddhist temples in Japan|Buddhist temples in Japan]] are concentrated. This name can be found in cities across Japan. In many [[Walled City|Castle towns]], temples and [[:en:cemeteries|cemeteries]] were grouped on the outskirts of the city to form a defensive line in case of enemy attacks. == Major Teramachi Locations == ; Tohoku Region * [[:en:Aomori Prefecture|Aomori Prefecture]]: [[:en:Hirosaki|Hirosaki]] - Nishishigemori area ({{ill|Zenrin Street|ja|禅林街|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenrin Street|1=Zenringai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11591192}}), {{ill|Niideramachi|ja|新寺町 (弘前市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Niideramachi|1=Shinderamachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11501898}} area * [[:en:Miyagi Prefecture|Miyagi Prefecture]]: [[:en:Sendai|Sendai]] - {{ill|Shintera|ja|新寺 (若林区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shintera|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Wakabayashi Ward * [[:en:Akita Prefecture|Akita Prefecture]]: [[:en:Akita City|Akita City]] - {{ill|Kyokuhoku|ja|旭北寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyokuhoku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} area ; Kanto Region * [[:en:Chiba Prefecture|Chiba Prefecture]]: [[:en:Funabashi|Funabashi]] - {{ill|Motomachi Teramachi|ja|本町寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Motomachi Teramachi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo]]: ** [[:en:Minato City|Minato City]] - [[:en:Mita, Minato, Tokyo|Mita]] Fourth Chome (see [[Tsukino Misaki]]) ** [[:en:Taito City|Taito City]] - [[:en:Yanaka, Tokyo|Yanaka]] ** [[:en:Setagaya|Setagaya]] - {{ill|Karasuyama Teramachi|ja|烏山寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Karasuyama Teramachi|1=Karasuyama Temple Town|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17990240}} ** [[:en:Hachioji|Hachioji]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Hachioji)|ja|寺町 (八王子市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Hachioji)|1=Teramachi, Hachioji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21019184}} ; Chubu Region * [[:en:Niigata Prefecture|Niigata Prefecture]]: ** [[:en:Joetsu|Joetsu]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Joetsu)|ja|寺町 (上越市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Joetsu)|1=Teramachi (Joetsu)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q85879611}} ** [[:en:Itoigawa|Itoigawa]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Itoigawa)|ja|寺町 (糸魚川市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Itoigawa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ** [[:en:Sado, Niigata|Sado, Niigata]] (Aikawa) - [[:en:Aikawa, Niigata|上寺町]], {{ill|Nakashiteramachi|ja|中寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakashiteramachi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Shimoteramachi|ja|下寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimoteramachi|1=Shimoteramachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11360787}}. Kamiteramachi is in ruins but part of the [[:en:Historic Sites of Japan|Historic Sites of Japan]] [[:en:Sado mine|Sado Kinzan]]. Nakashiteramachi and Shimoteramachi are part of the [[Important Cultural Landscape]] {{ill|Cultural Landscape of Aikawa|ja|佐渡相川の鉱山及び鉱山町の文化的景観|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cultural Landscape of Aikawa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and included in the World Heritage Site {{ill|Sado Island Gold Mines|ja|佐渡島の金山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sado Island Gold Mines|1=Sado Island Gold Mines|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q127378385}}. * [[:en:Ishikawa Prefecture|Ishikawa Prefecture]]: [[:en:Kanazawa|Kanazawa]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Kanazawa)|ja|寺町 [[fr:Teramachi]][[ja:寺町]][[zh:寺町]] [[fr:Teramachi]][[ja:寺町]][[zh:寺町]] [[fr:Teramachi]][[ja:寺町]][[zh:寺町]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11458043]] Wikidata name: Teramachi [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:30, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:56, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Confused|Jinaimachi}} '''Teramachi''' (寺町) refers to areas in Japan where [[:en:Buddhist temples in Japan|Buddhist temples in Japan]] are concentrated. This name can be found in cities across Japan. In many [[Walled City|Castle towns]], temples and [[:en:cemeteries|cemeteries]] were grouped on the outskirts of the city to form a defensive line in case of enemy attacks. == Major Teramachi Locations == ; Tohoku Region * [[:en:Aomori Prefecture|Aomori Prefecture]]: [[:en:Hirosaki|Hirosaki]] - Nishishigemori area ({{ill|Zenrin Street|ja|禅林街|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenrin Street|1=Zenringai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11591192}}), {{ill|Niideramachi|ja|新寺町 (弘前市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Niideramachi|1=Shinderamachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11501898}} area * [[:en:Miyagi Prefecture|Miyagi Prefecture]]: [[:en:Sendai|Sendai]] - {{ill|Shintera|ja|新寺 (若林区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shintera|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Wakabayashi Ward * [[:en:Akita Prefecture|Akita Prefecture]]: [[:en:Akita City|Akita City]] - {{ill|Kyokuhoku|ja|旭北寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyokuhoku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} area ; Kanto Region * [[:en:Chiba Prefecture|Chiba Prefecture]]: [[:en:Funabashi|Funabashi]] - {{ill|Motomachi Teramachi|ja|本町寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Motomachi Teramachi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo]]: ** [[:en:Minato City|Minato City]] - [[:en:Mita, Minato, Tokyo|Mita]] Fourth Chome (see [[Tsukino Misaki]]) ** [[:en:Taito City|Taito City]] - [[:en:Yanaka, Tokyo|Yanaka]] ** [[:en:Setagaya|Setagaya]] - {{ill|Karasuyama Teramachi|ja|烏山寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Karasuyama Teramachi|1=Karasuyama Temple Town|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17990240}} ** [[:en:Hachioji|Hachioji]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Hachioji)|ja|寺町 (八王子市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Hachioji)|1=Teramachi, Hachioji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21019184}} ; Chubu Region * [[:en:Niigata Prefecture|Niigata Prefecture]]: ** [[:en:Joetsu|Joetsu]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Joetsu)|ja|寺町 (上越市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Joetsu)|1=Teramachi (Joetsu)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q85879611}} ** [[:en:Itoigawa|Itoigawa]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Itoigawa)|ja|寺町 (糸魚川市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Itoigawa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ** [[:en:Sado, Niigata|Sado, Niigata]] (Aikawa) - [[:en:Aikawa, Niigata|上寺町]], {{ill|Nakashiteramachi|ja|中寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakashiteramachi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Shimoteramachi|ja|下寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimoteramachi|1=Shimoteramachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11360787}}. Kamiteramachi is in ruins but part of the [[:en:Historic Sites of Japan|Historic Sites of Japan]] [[:en:Sado mine|Sado Kinzan]]. Nakashiteramachi and Shimoteramachi are part of the [[Important Cultural Landscape]] {{ill|Cultural Landscape of Aikawa|ja|佐渡相川の鉱山及び鉱山町の文化的景観|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cultural Landscape of Aikawa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and included in the World Heritage Site {{ill|Sado Island Gold Mines|ja|佐渡島の金山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sado Island Gold Mines|1=Sado Island Gold Mines|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q127378385}}. * [[:en:Ishikawa Prefecture|Ishikawa Prefecture]]: [[:en:Kanazawa|Kanazawa]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Kanazawa)|ja|寺町 (金沢市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Kanazawa)|1=Teramachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q84921594}} * [[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]]: [[:en:Gifu|Gifu]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Gifu)|ja|寺町 (岐阜市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Gifu)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]]: [[:en:Handa|Handa]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Handa)|ja|寺町 (半田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Handa)|1=Teramachi (Handa)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q128848919}} * [[:en:Mie Prefecture|Mie Prefecture]]: [[:en:Kuwana|Kuwana]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Kuwana)|ja|寺町 (桑名市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Kuwana)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ; Kinki Region * [[:en:Kyoto Prefecture|Kyoto revision.text:
[[fr:Teramachi]][[ja:寺町]][[zh:寺町]] [[fr:Teramachi]][[ja:寺町]][[zh:寺町]] [[fr:Teramachi]][[ja:寺町]][[zh:寺町]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11458043]] Wikidata name: Teramachi [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:30, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:56, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Confused|Jinaimachi}} '''Teramachi''' (寺町) refers to areas in Japan where {{ill|Buddhist temples in Japan|en|Buddhist temples in Japan|WD=Q3141900|lt=Buddhist temples in Japan}} are concentrated. This name can be found in cities across Japan. In many [[Walled City|Castle towns]], temples and [[:en:cemeteries|cemeteries]] were grouped on the outskirts of the city to form a defensive line in case of enemy attacks. == Major Teramachi Locations == ; Tohoku Region * {{ill|Aomori Prefecture|en|Aomori Prefecture|WD=Q71699|lt=Aomori Prefecture}}: {{ill|Hirosaki|en|Hirosaki|WD=Q194087|lt=Hirosaki}} - Nishishigemori area ({{ill|Zenrin Street|ja|禅林街|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenrin Street|1=Zenringai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11591192}}), {{ill|Niideramachi|ja|新寺町 (弘前市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Niideramachi|1=Shinderamachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11501898}} area * {{ill|Miyagi Prefecture|en|Miyagi Prefecture|WD=Q47896|lt=Miyagi Prefecture}}: {{ill|Sendai|en|Sendai|WD=Q46747|lt=Sendai}} - {{ill|Shintera|ja|新寺 (若林区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shintera|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Wakabayashi Ward * {{ill|Akita Prefecture|en|Akita Prefecture|WD=Q81863|lt=Akita Prefecture}}: [[:en:Akita City|Akita City]] - {{ill|Kyokuhoku|ja|旭北寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyokuhoku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} area ; Kanto Region * {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|en|Chiba Prefecture|WD=Q80011|lt=Chiba Prefecture}}: {{ill|Funabashi|en|Funabashi|WD=Q271417|lt=Funabashi}} - {{ill|Motomachi Teramachi|ja|本町寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Motomachi Teramachi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|WD=Q1490|lt=Tokyo}}: ** [[:en:Minato City|Minato City]] - {{ill|Mita, Minato, Tokyo|en|Mita, Minato, Tokyo|WD=Q3317048|lt=Mita}} Fourth Chome (see [[Tsukino Misaki]]) ** [[:en:Taito City|Taito City]] - {{ill|Yanaka, Tokyo|en|Yanaka, Tokyo|WD=Q11632597|lt=Yanaka}} ** {{ill|Setagaya|en|Setagaya|WD=Q231645|lt=Setagaya}} - {{ill|Karasuyama Teramachi|ja|烏山寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Karasuyama Teramachi|1=Karasuyama Temple Town|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17990240}} ** [[:en:Hachioji|Hachioji]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Hachioji)|ja|寺町 (八王子市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Hachioji)|1=Teramachi, Hachioji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21019184}} ; Chubu Region * {{ill|Niigata Prefecture|en|Niigata Prefecture|WD=Q132705|lt=Niigata Prefecture}}: ** [[:en:Joetsu|Joetsu]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Joetsu)|ja|寺町 (上越市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Joetsu)|1=Teramachi (Joetsu)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q85879611}} ** {{ill|Itoigawa|en|Itoigawa|WD=Q857208|lt=Itoigawa}} - {{ill|Teramachi (Itoigawa)|ja|寺町 (糸魚川市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Itoigawa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ** {{ill|Sado, Niigata|en|Sado, Niigata|WD=Q499047|lt=Sado, Niigata}} (Aikawa) - {{ill|Aikawa, Niigata|en|Aikawa, Niigata|WD=Q11582006|lt=上寺町}}, {{ill|Nakashiteramachi|ja|中寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakashiteramachi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Shimoteramachi|ja|下寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimoteramachi|1=Shimoteramachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11360787}}. Kamiteramachi is in ruins but part of the [[:en:Historic Sites of Japan|Historic Sites of Japan]] {{ill|Sado mine|en|Sado mine|WD=Q11248197|lt=Sado Kinzan}}. Nakashiteramachi and Shimoteramachi are part of the [[Important Cultural Landscape]] {{ill|Cultural Landscape of Aikawa|ja|佐渡相川の鉱山及び鉱山町の文化的景観|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cultural Landscape of Aikawa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and included in the World Heritage Site {{ill|Sado Island Gold Mines|ja|佐渡島の金山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sado Island Gold Mines|1=Sado Island Gold [[fr:Teramachi]][[ja:寺町]][[zh:寺町]] [[fr:Teramachi]][[ja:寺町]][[zh:寺町]] [[fr:Teramachi]][[ja:寺町]][[zh:寺町]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11458043]] Wikidata name: Teramachi [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:30, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:56, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Confused|Jinaimachi}} '''Teramachi''' (寺町) refers to areas in Japan where {{ill|Buddhist temples in Japan|en|Buddhist temples in Japan|WD=Q3141900|lt=Buddhist temples in Japan}} are concentrated. This name can be found in cities across Japan. In many [[Walled City|Castle towns]], temples and [[:en:cemeteries|cemeteries]] were grouped on the outskirts of the city to form a defensive line in case of enemy attacks. == Major Teramachi Locations == ; Tohoku Region * {{ill|Aomori Prefecture|en|Aomori Prefecture|WD=Q71699|lt=Aomori Prefecture}}: {{ill|Hirosaki|en|Hirosaki|WD=Q194087|lt=Hirosaki}} - Nishishigemori area ({{ill|Zenrin Street|ja|禅林街|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenrin Street|1=Zenringai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11591192}}), {{ill|Niideramachi|ja|新寺町 (弘前市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Niideramachi|1=Shinderamachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11501898}} area * {{ill|Miyagi Prefecture|en|Miyagi Prefecture|WD=Q47896|lt=Miyagi Prefecture}}: {{ill|Sendai|en|Sendai|WD=Q46747|lt=Sendai}} - {{ill|Shintera|ja|新寺 (若林区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shintera|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Wakabayashi Ward * {{ill|Akita Prefecture|en|Akita Prefecture|WD=Q81863|lt=Akita Prefecture}}: [[:en:Akita City|Akita City]] - {{ill|Kyokuhoku|ja|旭北寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyokuhoku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} area ; Kanto Region * {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|en|Chiba Prefecture|WD=Q80011|lt=Chiba Prefecture}}: {{ill|Funabashi|en|Funabashi|WD=Q271417|lt=Funabashi}} - {{ill|Motomachi Teramachi|ja|本町寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Motomachi Teramachi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|WD=Q1490|lt=Tokyo}}: ** [[:en:Minato City|Minato City]] - {{ill|Mita, Minato, Tokyo|en|Mita, Minato, Tokyo|WD=Q3317048|lt=Mita}} Fourth Chome (see [[Tsukino Misaki]]) ** [[:en:Taito City|Taito City]] - {{ill|Yanaka, Tokyo|en|Yanaka, Tokyo|WD=Q11632597|lt=Yanaka}} ** {{ill|Setagaya|en|Setagaya|WD=Q231645|lt=Setagaya}} - {{ill|Karasuyama Teramachi|ja|烏山寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Karasuyama Teramachi|1=Karasuyama Temple Town|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17990240}} ** [[:en:Hachioji|Hachioji]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Hachioji)|ja|寺町 (八王子市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Hachioji)|1=Teramachi, Hachioji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21019184}} ; Chubu Region * {{ill|Niigata Prefecture|en|Niigata Prefecture|WD=Q132705|lt=Niigata Prefecture}}: ** [[:en:Joetsu|Joetsu]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Joetsu)|ja|寺町 (上越市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Joetsu)|1=Teramachi (Joetsu)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q85879611}} ** {{ill|Itoigawa|en|Itoigawa|WD=Q857208|lt=Itoigawa}} - {{ill|Teramachi (Itoigawa)|ja|寺町 (糸魚川市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Itoigawa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ** {{ill|Sado, Niigata|en|Sado, Niigata|WD=Q499047|lt=Sado, Niigata}} (Aikawa) - {{ill|Aikawa, Niigata|en|Aikawa, Niigata|WD=Q11582006|lt=上寺町}}, {{ill|Nakashiteramachi|ja|中寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakashiteramachi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Shimoteramachi|ja|下寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimoteramachi|1=Shimoteramachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11360787}}. Kamiteramachi is in ruins but part of the [[:en:Historic Sites of Japan|Historic Sites of Japan]] {{ill|Sado mine|en|Sado mine|WD=Q11248197|lt=Sado Kinzan}}. Nakashiteramachi and Shimoteramachi are part of the [[Important Cultural Landscape]] {{ill|Cultural Landscape of Aikawa|ja|佐渡相川の鉱山及び鉱山町の文化的景観|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cultural Landscape of [[fr:Teramachi]][[ja:寺町]][[zh:寺町]] [[fr:Teramachi]][[ja:寺町]][[zh:寺町]] [[fr:Teramachi]][[ja:寺町]][[zh:寺町]] {{Confused|Jinaimachi}} '''Teramachi''' (寺町) refers to areas in Japan where {{ill|Buddhist temples in Japan|en|Buddhist temples in Japan|WD=Q3141900|lt=Buddhist temples in Japan}} are concentrated. This name can be found in cities across Japan. In many [[Walled City|Castle towns]], temples and [[:en:cemeteries|cemeteries]] were grouped on the outskirts of the city to form a defensive line in case of enemy attacks. == Major Teramachi Locations == ; Tohoku Region * {{ill|Aomori Prefecture|en|Aomori Prefecture|WD=Q71699|lt=Aomori Prefecture}}: {{ill|Hirosaki|en|Hirosaki|WD=Q194087|lt=Hirosaki}} - Nishishigemori area ({{ill|Zenrin Street|ja|禅林街|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenrin Street|1=Zenringai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11591192}}), {{ill|Niideramachi|ja|新寺町 (弘前市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Niideramachi|1=Shinderamachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11501898}} area * {{ill|Miyagi Prefecture|en|Miyagi Prefecture|WD=Q47896|lt=Miyagi Prefecture}}: {{ill|Sendai|en|Sendai|WD=Q46747|lt=Sendai}} - {{ill|Shintera|ja|新寺 (若林区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shintera|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Wakabayashi Ward * {{ill|Akita Prefecture|en|Akita Prefecture|WD=Q81863|lt=Akita Prefecture}}: [[:en:Akita City|Akita City]] - {{ill|Kyokuhoku|ja|旭北寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyokuhoku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} area ; Kanto Region * {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|en|Chiba Prefecture|WD=Q80011|lt=Chiba Prefecture}}: {{ill|Funabashi|en|Funabashi|WD=Q271417|lt=Funabashi}} - {{ill|Motomachi Teramachi|ja|本町寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Motomachi Teramachi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|WD=Q1490|lt=Tokyo}}: ** [[:en:Minato City|Minato City]] - {{ill|Mita, Minato, Tokyo|en|Mita, Minato, Tokyo|WD=Q3317048|lt=Mita}} Fourth Chome (see [[Tsukino Misaki]]) ** [[:en:Taito City|Taito City]] - {{ill|Yanaka, Tokyo|en|Yanaka, Tokyo|WD=Q11632597|lt=Yanaka}} ** {{ill|Setagaya|en|Setagaya|WD=Q231645|lt=Setagaya}} - {{ill|Karasuyama Teramachi|ja|烏山寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Karasuyama Teramachi|1=Karasuyama Temple Town|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17990240}} ** [[:en:Hachioji|Hachioji]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Hachioji)|ja|寺町 (八王子市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Hachioji)|1=Teramachi, Hachioji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21019184}} ; Kamiteramachi is in ruins but part of the [[:en:Historic Sites of Japan|Historic Sites of Japan]] {{ill|Sado mine|en|Sado mine|WD=Q11248197|lt=Sado Kinzan}}. Nakashiteramachi and Shimoteramachi are part of the [[Important Cultural Landscape]] {{ill|Cultural Landscape of Aikawa|ja|佐渡相川の鉱山及び鉱山町の文化的景観|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cultural Landscape of
