revision.text:
[[fr:Teramachi]][[ja:寺町]][[zh:寺町]] [[fr:Teramachi]][[ja:寺町]][[zh:寺町]] [[fr:Teramachi]][[ja:寺町]][[zh:寺町]] {{Confused|Jinaimachi}} '''Teramachi''' (寺町) refers to areas in Japan where {{ill|Buddhist temples in Japan|en|Buddhist temples in Japan|WD=Q3141900|lt=Buddhist temples in Japan}} are concentrated. This name can be found in cities across Japan. In many [[Walled City|Castle towns]], temples and [[:en:cemeteries|cemeteries]] were grouped on the outskirts of the city to form a defensive line in case of enemy attacks. == Major Teramachi Locations == ; Tohoku Region * {{ill|Aomori Prefecture|en|Aomori Prefecture|WD=Q71699|lt=Aomori Prefecture}}: {{ill|Hirosaki|en|Hirosaki|WD=Q194087|lt=Hirosaki}} - Nishishigemori area ({{ill|Zenrin Street|ja|禅林街|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenrin Street|1=Zenringai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11591192}}), {{ill|Niideramachi|ja|新寺町 (弘前市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Niideramachi|1=Shinderamachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11501898}} area * {{ill|Miyagi Prefecture|en|Miyagi Prefecture|WD=Q47896|lt=Miyagi Prefecture}}: {{ill|Sendai|en|Sendai|WD=Q46747|lt=Sendai}} - {{ill|Shintera|ja|新寺 (若林区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shintera|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Wakabayashi Ward * {{ill|Akita Prefecture|en|Akita Prefecture|WD=Q81863|lt=Akita Prefecture}}: [[:en:Akita City|Akita City]] - {{ill|Kyokuhoku|ja|旭北寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyokuhoku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} area ; Kanto Region * {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|en|Chiba Prefecture|WD=Q80011|lt=Chiba Prefecture}}: {{ill|Funabashi|en|Funabashi|WD=Q271417|lt=Funabashi}} - {{ill|Motomachi Teramachi|ja|本町寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Motomachi Teramachi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|WD=Q1490|lt=Tokyo}}: ** [[:en:Minato City|Minato City]] - {{ill|Mita, Minato, Tokyo|en|Mita, Minato, Tokyo|WD=Q3317048|lt=Mita}} Fourth Chome (see [[Tsukino Misaki]]) ** [[:en:Taito City|Taito City]] - {{ill|Yanaka, Tokyo|en|Yanaka, Tokyo|WD=Q11632597|lt=Yanaka}} ** {{ill|Setagaya|en|Setagaya|WD=Q231645|lt=Setagaya}} - {{ill|Karasuyama Teramachi|ja|烏山寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Karasuyama Teramachi|1=Karasuyama Temple Town|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17990240}} ** [[:en:Hachioji|Hachioji]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Hachioji)|ja|寺町 (八王子市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Hachioji)|1=Teramachi, Hachioji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21019184}} ; Chubu Region * {{ill|Niigata Prefecture|en|Niigata Prefecture|WD=Q132705|lt=Niigata Prefecture}}: ** [[:en:Joetsu|Joetsu]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Joetsu)|ja|寺町 (上越市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Joetsu)|1=Teramachi (Joetsu)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q85879611}} ** {{ill|Itoigawa|en|Itoigawa|WD=Q857208|lt=Itoigawa}} - {{ill|Teramachi (Itoigawa)|ja|寺町 (糸魚川市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Itoigawa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ** {{ill|Sado, Niigata|en|Sado, Niigata|WD=Q499047|lt=Sado, Niigata}} (Aikawa) - {{ill|Aikawa, Niigata|en|Aikawa, Niigata|WD=Q11582006|lt=上寺町}}, {{ill|Nakashiteramachi|ja|中寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakashiteramachi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Shimoteramachi|ja|下寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimoteramachi|1=Shimoteramachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11360787}}. Kamiteramachi is in ruins but part of the [[:en:Historic Sites of Japan|Historic Sites of Japan]] {{ill|Sado mine|en|Sado mine|WD=Q11248197|lt=Sado Kinzan}}. Nakashiteramachi and Shimoteramachi are part of the [[Important Cultural Landscape]] {{ill|Cultural Landscape of Aikawa|ja|佐渡相川の鉱山及び鉱山町の文化的景観|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cultural Landscape of Aikawa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and included in the World Heritage Site {{ill|Sado Island Gold Mines|ja|佐渡島の金山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sado Island Gold Mines|1=Sado Island Gold Mines|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q127378385}}. * {{ill|Ishikawa Prefecture|en|Ishikawa Prefecture|WD=Q131281|lt=Ishikawa Prefecture}}: [[fr:Teramachi]][[ja:寺町]][[zh:寺町]] [[fr:Teramachi]][[ja:寺町]][[zh:寺町]] [[fr:Teramachi]][[ja:寺町]][[zh:寺町]] {{Confused|Jinaimachi}} '''Teramachi''' (寺町) refers to areas in Japan where {{ill|Buddhist temples in Japan|en|Buddhist temples in Japan|WD=Q3141900|lt=Buddhist temples in Japan|1=Buddhist temples in Japan}} are concentrated. This name can be found in cities across Japan. In many [[Walled City|Castle towns]], temples and [[:en:cemeteries|cemeteries]] were grouped on the outskirts of the city to form a defensive line in case of enemy attacks. == Major Teramachi Locations == ; Tohoku Region * {{ill|Aomori Prefecture|en|Aomori Prefecture|WD=Q71699|lt=Aomori Prefecture|1=Aomori Prefecture}}: {{ill|Hirosaki|en|Hirosaki|WD=Q194087|lt=Hirosaki|1=Hirosaki}} - Nishishigemori area ({{ill|Zenrin Street|ja|禅林街|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenrin Street|1=Zenringai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11591192}}), {{ill|Niideramachi|ja|新寺町 (弘前市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Niideramachi|1=Shinderamachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11501898}} area * {{ill|Miyagi Prefecture|en|Miyagi Prefecture|WD=Q47896|lt=Miyagi Prefecture|1=Miyagi Prefecture}}: {{ill|Sendai|en|Sendai|WD=Q46747|lt=Sendai|1=Sendai}} - {{ill|Shintera|ja|新寺 (若林区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shintera|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Wakabayashi Ward * {{ill|Akita Prefecture|en|Akita Prefecture|WD=Q81863|lt=Akita Prefecture|1=Akita Prefecture}}: [[:en:Akita City|Akita City]] - {{ill|Kyokuhoku|ja|旭北寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyokuhoku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} area ; Kanto Region * {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|en|Chiba Prefecture|WD=Q80011|lt=Chiba Prefecture|1=Chiba Prefecture}}: {{ill|Funabashi|en|Funabashi|WD=Q271417|lt=Funabashi|1=Funabashi}} - {{ill|Motomachi Teramachi|ja|本町寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Motomachi Teramachi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|WD=Q1490|lt=Tokyo|1=Tokyo}}: ** [[:en:Minato City|Minato City]] - {{ill|Mita, Minato, Tokyo|en|Mita, Minato, Tokyo|WD=Q3317048|lt=Mita|1=Mita, Minato, Tokyo}} Fourth Chome (see [[Tsukino Misaki]]) ** [[:en:Taito City|Taito City]] - {{ill|Yanaka, Tokyo|en|Yanaka, Tokyo|WD=Q11632597|lt=Yanaka|1=Yanaka, Tokyo}} ** {{ill|Setagaya|en|Setagaya|WD=Q231645|lt=Setagaya|1=Setagaya}} - {{ill|Karasuyama Teramachi|ja|烏山寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Karasuyama Teramachi|1=Karasuyama Temple Town|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17990240}} ** [[:en:Hachioji|Hachioji]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Hachioji)|ja|寺町 (八王子市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Hachioji)|1=Teramachi, Hachioji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21019184}} ; Chubu Region * {{ill|Niigata Prefecture|en|Niigata Prefecture|WD=Q132705|lt=Niigata Prefecture|1=Niigata Prefecture}}: ** [[:en:Joetsu|Joetsu]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Joetsu)|ja|寺町 (上越市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Joetsu)|1=Q85879611|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q85879611}} ** {{ill|Itoigawa|en|Itoigawa|WD=Q857208|lt=Itoigawa|1=Itoigawa}} - {{ill|Teramachi (Itoigawa)|ja|寺町 (糸魚川市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Itoigawa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ** {{ill|Sado, Niigata|en|Sado, Niigata|WD=Q499047|lt=Sado, Niigata|1=Sado, Niigata}} (Aikawa) - {{ill|Aikawa, Niigata|en|Aikawa, Niigata|WD=Q11582006|lt=上寺町|1=Aikawa, Niigata}}, {{ill|Nakashiteramachi|ja|中寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakashiteramachi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Shimoteramachi|ja|下寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimoteramachi|1=Q11360787|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11360787}}. Kamiteramachi is in ruins but part of the [[:en:Historic Sites of Japan|Historic Sites of Japan]] {{ill|Sado mine|en|Sado mine|WD=Q11248197|lt=Sado Kinzan|1=Sado mine}}. Nakashiteramachi and Shimoteramachi are part of the [[Important Cultural Landscape]] {{ill|Cultural Landscape of Aikawa|ja|佐渡相川の鉱山及び鉱山町の文化的景観|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cultural Landscape of Aikawa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and included in the World Heritage Site {{ill|Sado Island Gold Mines|ja|佐渡島の金山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sado Island Gold Mines|1=Sado Island Gold [[fr:Teramachi]][[ja:寺町]][[zh:寺町]] [[fr:Teramachi]][[ja:寺町]][[zh:寺町]] [[fr:Teramachi]][[ja:寺町]][[zh:寺町]] {{Confused|Jinaimachi}} '''Teramachi''' (寺町) refers to areas in Japan where {{ill|Buddhist temples in Japan|en|Buddhist temples in Japan|WD=Q3141900|lt=Buddhist temples in Japan|1=Buddhist temples in Japan}} are concentrated. This name can be found in cities across Japan. In many [[Walled City|Castle towns]], temples and [[:en:cemeteries|cemeteries]] were grouped on the outskirts of the city to form a defensive line in case of enemy attacks. == Major Teramachi Locations == ; Tohoku Region * {{ill|Aomori Prefecture|en|Aomori Prefecture|WD=Q71699|lt=Aomori Prefecture|1=Aomori Prefecture}}: {{ill|Hirosaki|en|Hirosaki|WD=Q194087|lt=Hirosaki|1=Hirosaki}} - Nishishigemori area ({{ill|Zenrin Street|ja|禅林街|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenrin Street|1=Zenringai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11591192}}), {{ill|Niideramachi|ja|新寺町 (弘前市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Niideramachi|1=Shinderamachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11501898}} area * {{ill|Miyagi Prefecture|en|Miyagi Prefecture|WD=Q47896|lt=Miyagi Prefecture|1=Miyagi Prefecture}}: {{ill|Sendai|en|Sendai|WD=Q46747|lt=Sendai|1=Sendai}} - {{ill|Shintera|ja|新寺 (若林区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shintera|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Wakabayashi Ward * {{ill|Akita Prefecture|en|Akita Prefecture|WD=Q81863|lt=Akita Prefecture|1=Akita Prefecture}}: [[:en:Akita City|Akita City]] - {{ill|Kyokuhoku|ja|旭北寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyokuhoku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} area ; Kanto Region * {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|en|Chiba Prefecture|WD=Q80011|lt=Chiba Prefecture|1=Chiba Prefecture}}: {{ill|Funabashi|en|Funabashi|WD=Q271417|lt=Funabashi|1=Funabashi}} - {{ill|Motomachi Teramachi|ja|本町寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Motomachi Teramachi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|WD=Q1490|lt=Tokyo|1=Tokyo}}: ** [[:en:Minato City|Minato City]] - {{ill|Mita, Minato, Tokyo|en|Mita, Minato, Tokyo|WD=Q3317048|lt=Mita|1=Mita, Minato, Tokyo}} Fourth Chome (see [[Tsukino Misaki]]) ** [[:en:Taito City|Taito City]] - {{ill|Yanaka, Tokyo|en|Yanaka, Tokyo|WD=Q11632597|lt=Yanaka|1=Yanaka, Tokyo}} ** {{ill|Setagaya|en|Setagaya|WD=Q231645|lt=Setagaya|1=Setagaya}} - {{ill|Karasuyama Teramachi|ja|烏山寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Karasuyama Teramachi|1=Karasuyama Temple Town|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17990240}} ** [[:en:Hachioji|Hachioji]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Hachioji)|ja|寺町 (八王子市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Hachioji)|1=Teramachi, Hachioji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21019184}} ; Chubu Region * {{ill|Niigata Prefecture|en|Niigata Prefecture|WD=Q132705|lt=Niigata Prefecture|1=Niigata Prefecture}}: ** [[:en:Joetsu|Joetsu]] - {{ill|Teramachi (Joetsu)|ja|寺町 (上越市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Joetsu)|1=Q85879611|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q85879611}} ** {{ill|Itoigawa|en|Itoigawa|WD=Q857208|lt=Itoigawa|1=Itoigawa}} - {{ill|Teramachi (Itoigawa)|ja|寺町 (糸魚川市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teramachi (Itoigawa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ** {{ill|Sado, Niigata|en|Sado, Niigata|WD=Q499047|lt=Sado, Niigata|1=Sado, Niigata}} (Aikawa) - {{ill|Aikawa, Niigata|en|Aikawa, Niigata|WD=Q11582006|lt=上寺町|1=Aikawa, Niigata}}, {{ill|Nakashiteramachi|ja|中寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakashiteramachi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Shimoteramachi|ja|下寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimoteramachi|1=Q11360787|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11360787}}. Kamiteramachi is in ruins but part of the [[:en:Historic Sites of Japan|Historic Sites of Japan]] {{ill|Sado mine|en|Sado mine|WD=Q11248197|lt=Sado Kinzan|1=Sado mine}}. Nakashiteramachi and Shimoteramachi are part of the [[Important Cultural Landscape]] {{ill|Cultural Landscape of Aikawa|ja|佐渡相川の鉱山及び鉱山町の文化的景観|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cultural Landscape of Aikawa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and included in the World Heritage Site {{ill|Sado Island Gold Mines|ja|佐渡島の金山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sado Island Gold Mines|1=Sado Island Gold Mines|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q127378385}}. * {{ill|Ishikawa Prefecture|en|Ishikawa Prefecture|WD=Q131281|lt=Ishikawa Prefecture|1=Ishikawa Prefecture}}:
